title: Dedicated HubSpot Implementation Developer (Long-term partnership with an Agency)
description:
Summary:



I’m looking for a hands-on HubSpot implementation developer to work with me on an ongoing basis.



This is not a strategy or consulting role.

Your core job is to take clearly scoped tasks, ask thoughtful clarification questions when needed, and execute them cleanly in HubSpot.



You’ll be working directly with me. I design the systems and logic. You build them correctly.



This role suits someone who has already built HubSpot environments from scratch, understands how different hubs interact, and can move fast without breaking data integrity.



What You’ll Be Doing (Core Responsibilities)

• Building and maintaining HubSpot workflows (Sales, Marketing & Operations)

• Creating and managing:

• Custom properties (with correct data types & logic)

• Deal, Contact, Company & Custom Object automations

• Lead routing & ownership logic

• Lifecycle stage & pipeline logic

• Implementing reporting & dashboards:

• Sales performance

• Funnel conversion

• Pipeline health

• Activity & productivity tracking

• Working across all HubSpot hubs:

• Sales Hub

• Marketing Hub

• Operations Hub

• Service Hub (where relevant)

• Supporting integrations and data flows (Stripe, forms, external tools where required)

• Executing daily task lists with minimal hand-holding





How We’ll Work Together

I’ll give you:

• Clear tasks

• Context on why something is being built

You’ll:

• Ask clarification questions once

• Confirm understanding

• Execute accurately

Expect:

• Structured work

• High standards

• Long-term collaboration if you perform well





Required Experience (Non-Negotiable)



You must have:

• Proven experience building HubSpot systems, not just using them

• Strong understanding of:

• Workflow logic

• Re-enrolment criteria

• Property syncing & precedence

• Data hygiene

• Experience working with:

• Multiple pipelines

• Complex lifecycle logic

• Custom objects

• Confidence working independently once requirements are clear



If you’ve only done light CRM admin work or basic
 workflows, this role is not for you.



Nice to Have (Bonus)

• Experience with:

• Stripe / payments logic

• Deal-to-invoice style flows

• Reporting for leadership / revenue tracking

• Familiarity with automation-first system design

• Comfort working with structured SOPs and logic diagrams





Application Requirements



To apply, you must include:

1. A brief summary of your HubSpot implementation experience

2. Examples of:

• Automations you’ve built

• Reports or dashboards you’ve implemented

• Any complex workflows you’re proud of

3. Confirmation that you’re comfortable completing a short practical task as part of the selection process



Applications without relevant HubSpot experience will be ignored.



Engagement Details

• Ongoing work (not a one-off project)

• Flexible hours

• Paid hourly or retainer (to be discussed)

• Long-term opportunity for the right person

title: Ad Translator / Localizer
description:
Job Title: Video Editor for Ad Localization (
 + ElevenLabs) – Part-Time / Long Term

About the Role: We are a fast-growing ecommerce business looking for a consistent Video Editor to help us localize testing ads. We are looking for a long-term partner who wants to grow with us.

The Job: You will produce 6–10 video variations per day. You do not need to film or create videos from scratch. Your job is to take existing winning ads and localize them for new markets using AI tools.

Your Daily Workflow:



You will be given video's to

Translate & Sub: Use 
 to auto-generate translated subtitles.

Dub: Use ElevenLabs to create a localized AI voiceover.

Edit: Sync the audio and text so it looks like a native ad.



Requirements:



Experience with 
 and ElevenLabs is a big plus (but we will train you).

A good feel for languages is a strong bonus — you don't need to be fluent in the target languages (AI handles translation), but being able to spot when a subtitle, dub, or phrasing feels "off" is a huge asset. (Most common languages are German, French and Dutch, but can be any EU language) 



If you speak or have studied more than one language, tell us.



Fast internet connection.

Ability to hit the daily target (6–10 videos) consistently.

Attention to detail (syncing audio dubs perfectly with video).



Compensation & Schedule:



Salary: 26,732.25 PHP / Month (Paid weekly or bi-weekly).

Hours: ~20 Hours / Week (Part-Time).

Tools Provided: We pay for the 
 and ElevenLabs subscriptions.

Benefits: Paid time off and bonuses available after 3 months of consistent performance.

Growth: We promote from within—successful editors can move into creative strategist roles.



How to Apply:



Change the subject line to: "AD TRANSLATOR - [Your Name]" (Messages with the wrong subject will be ignored).

Include a link to your portfolio or a Google Drive folder showing Reels/TikTok style videos you have edited.

Briefly mention your experience with AI voiceover or translation tools.

List any languages you speak, have studied, or feel comfortable "ear-checking" for quality.

Confirm you are available to work ~25 hours per week.



Next Steps: If your application looks good, we will invite you to a paid trial task. If the trial goes well, we can onboard you immediately.

Good luck,

Nelson

description:

While your background in Amazon is important, your primary responsibility will be to manage and lead the growth of our Mercado Libre account.



This role is ideal for someone who understands e-commerce fundamentals—PPC, listings, inventory, and profitability—and is ready to apply those skills to scale a new marketplace.

- Take full ownership of our Mercado Libre account

- Develop and execute strategies to drive sales growth

- Optimize listings, pricing, and overall marketplace performance

- Monitor account health and ensure platform compliance



Amazon Account Support (Secondary)

- Support ongoing optimization of Amazon accounts

- Apply best practices from Amazon to improve performance across platforms



Inventory Management

- Monitor inventory levels and turnover

- Coordinate with the Supply Chain team to prevent stockouts and overstocking



Listing Optimization

- Continuously optimize for higher conversion rates

- Monitor key metrics: CTR, CPC, CVR, ACOS, ROAS

- Adjust bids, budgets, and targeting to improve performance



Data & Strategy

- Analyze sales and traffic data regularly

- Conduct keyword research and competitor analysis

- Identify growth opportunities and implement strategies



Profitability & Reporting

- Monitor P&L and ensure profitability targets are met

- Maintain TACOS targets where applicable



Team Collaboration

- Work closely with the Gen VA team for account support



Requirements:

- Proven experience managing Amazon Seller Central accounts

- Strong understanding of Amazon PPC (ACOS, TACOS, ROAS)

- Experience in listing optimization and conversion improvement

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

- Willingness to learn and lead Mercado Libre account growth

Helium 10 (H10)

DataDive

Scale Insights

SoStocked

We are a fast-paced company. While we work as a team, each member is expected to take full ownership of their role and work independently. Please apply only if you are confident in your ability to meet these expectations.

title: B2B Appointment Setter — Cold Calling US Small Businesses (Evening PH Hours)
description:
Clear Local Edge is a US-based digital marketing agency helping small service businesses in Florida get more customers through Google. We need an appointment setter to call prospects from our pre-qualified lead list, follow our scripts, and book discovery calls on our calendar.



THE JOB:

- Call 30-40 small business owners per day from our provided lead list

- Follow our proven sales scripts (you will NOT need to "sell" — just qualify + book)

- Book interested prospects on Cal.com for a 30-min strategy call with our team

- Log every call outcome in a shared tracking sheet with notes and status

- Light
 nurture via Instantly (reply handling, simple follow-ups)

- Eventually manage client accounts in our white-label marketing platform (training provided)



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

- Clear, neutral English — US business owners must understand you on the first try

- Confident phone presence (script provided, but you must sound natural, not robotic)

- Prior B2B cold calling or appointment setting experience (required)

- Comfortable being told "no" 20+ times a day and still picking up the phone

- Familiar with Google Workspace and basic spreadsheet work (we will train on the rest)



HOURS:

- 9:00 PM to 2:00 AM Manila time (= 9 AM to 2 PM US Eastern — Florida business hours)

- Start at 20 hours/week, ramping to 40 hours/week within 4-6 weeks based on performance

- Monday through Friday



COMPENSATION:

- $6/hour USD base, paid weekly via your preferred method

- Performance bonus: $15 per qualified appointment that shows up

- Raises after 30 days based on booking rate and call quality



SCREENING:

- Please record a 60-second voice sample introducing yourself AND leaving a sample voi
 as if you were calling a US plumber offering a free Google Business Profile audit (we will provide the one-line pitch if you reply).

- Must be available for a 15-minute live video interview before we hire.



Serious applicants only — if you have not done outbound B2B calling before, please do not apply. We will train on our tools but cannot train the phone skill itself.

title: VA - AI Image & Video Content Creation (Long-term, Flexible Hours)
description:
We're looking for a reliable and proactive Virtual Assistant to help us produce video content creation by executing prompts on AI image and AI video tools. No editing or creative experience required — everything is documented in step-by-step SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures) that we'll train you on.



What You'll Actually Do



* Run AI image generation prompts (we provide the prompts and the tool — you execute them and save the outputs).

* Run AI video generation prompts the same way.

* Organize and deliver the generated assets following our naming and folder conventions.

* Gradually take on additional small tasks as you grow into the role: thumbnail creation, YouTube scheduling, and other assistant work. We add tasks one at a time, with training for each.



You will NOT need to invent prompts, do complex video editing, or make creative decisions on day one. The work is execution-based and SOP-driven.



Hours & Compensation (Flexible Start)



Starting rate: $2 USD / hour

Initial workload: 4–6 hours per day, depending on volume and how quickly you ramp up.

Expandable to 8 hours per day once you gain traction and we can assign more videos.

Time tracked with Hubstaff (installed on your PC).

Long-term position for the right person. Hourly rate can increase once your speed, quality, and reliability are proven.



Consistency Is Non-Negotiable

We publish multiple videos every single day across multiple YouTube channels. A single missed day disrupts the whole pipeline.



We need someone who shows up daily, on schedule.

Repeated missed work without a valid reason will lead to termination.

We value people who take pride in doing the job well every day, not only when it's convenient.



Requirements



No prior video editing experience needed — but you must be able to follow written SOPs carefully and learn new tools quickly.

Strong sense of responsibility, discipline, and consistency.

Reliable computer and stable internet connection.

Comfortable following English instructions, screenshots, and tutorials.

Willing to use Hubstaff time tracker during paid hours.





To Apply, Please Send:



A short message introducing yourself and why you're interested.

Any prior experience (if any) with AI image/video tools, YouTube, or following SOPs.

Confirmation that you can commit to 4–6 hours per day to start, with availability to scale to 8 hours later.

Confirmation that you're comfortable using Hubstaff.

title: Video Editor (After Effects Specialist)
description:
About Storyy



Storyy is a creative content company helping brands and individuals elevate their online presence through powerful storytelling and engaging video content. We’re a fast-growing team of editors, designers, and marketers passionate about creating content that connects, inspires, and converts.



We’re looking for a Video Editor with strong expertise in Adobe After Effects to join our team. This role is perfect for someone who has a strong eye for detail, creativity in motion graphics, and the ability to bring stories to life through animation and editing.



Responsibilities:

Edit and assemble high-quality video content for social media, brand campaigns, and other digital platforms.

Create dynamic motion graphics, visual effects, and animations using Adobe After Effects.

Collaborate with creative leads, content strategists, and other editors to ensure videos align with brand standards and storytelling goals.

Enhance raw footage with appropriate music, sound effects, transitions, and color grading.

Implement text animations, lower thirds, logo animations, and other visual elements as needed.

Stay updated with the latest editing trends, social media video formats, and animation styles.

Manage multiple projects simultaneously while meeting tight deadlines.



Qualifications:

title: Commercial Construction Project Estimator
description:
Join a commercial construction-related equipment manufacturer and play a key role in preparing accurate estimates and project bids to help them win more business.



This is not just a data entry role. You’ll be expected to think through the details, spot gaps, and make sure everything makes sense before pricing a project. You’ll have ownership of your work and contribute to building clear, accurate, and competitive proposals.



We’re looking for someone detail-oriented, reliable, and experienced in construction bidding who can manage multiple projects at the same time.



Responsibilities:

- Review project plans, specifications, drawings, and scope to understand requirements.

- Develop detailed cost estimates, proposals, and bid submissions.

- Interpret and annotate drawings based on project needs and constraints.

- Handle multiple bid requests simultaneously and meet deadlines.

- Work closely with project stakeholders, including Owners, Project Managers, Superintendents, and Subcontractors.

- Reach out to suppliers and subcontractors to gather pricing and ensure accurate proposals.

- Prepare and communicate complete proposals and estimates based on project requirements.

- Assist in pricing discussions and adjustments to stay competitive.



Requirements:

- 3+ years of experience with commercial construction bidding, whether as a supplier, general contractor, or subcontractor.

- 1+ year WFH experience supporting US-based clients.

- Experience with communicating and negotiating pricing is a major plus.

- Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal.

- Highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable juggling multiple tasks.

- Comfortable managing a high volume of bids with accuracy and efficiency.

- Strong communication skills and ability to coordinate with multiple stakeholders.

- Organized, detail-oriented, and able to work independently.

- Must be available to work graveyard hours aligned with U.S. time zones.

- Reliable internet connection and dedicated work-from-home setup required.



Salary and Benefits:

- Base salary: 55,000 PHP per month

- 100% remote / work-from-home

- PTO and paid holidays



When applying, please send your resume link, explain why  you're a good fit. Also, copy and paste this Job ID: recN7dSXXziR82Mlq into your
 response, along with this message: “I’m excited to be applying to Job recN7dSXXziR82Mlq!” This will let us know what job you’re applying for as well as show us that you actually read this entire job description (attention to detail is everything). Thanks and hope to hear from you soon!

title: Senior Patient Coordinator & Strategic Logistics VA (PST)
description:
Schedule: Monday – Friday | 6:00 AM – 2:00 PM PST (Pacific Standard Time)



Type: Full-Time (40 Hours/Week)



Rate: $5.00 – $7.00 USD/hour (Based on experience + Night Shift Differential)



We are a specialized foot care business serving a high volume of senior citizens across the West Coast. We are looking for a dedicated, empathetic, and strategically-minded Virtual Assistant to be the "voice" of our company and the manager of our local digital presence.



This is a multi-faceted role. Your primary goal is to ensure our senior patients feel heard and understood, while simultaneously managing the complex logistics of 7 mobile nurses to ensure maximum efficiency and minimum travel costs.



Key Responsibilities



1. Patient Communication & Scheduling (Highest Priority)



The "Senior Voice": Answer incoming calls from elderly patients. You must speak slowly, clearly, and with extreme patience, as many of our clients are hard of hearing.



Empathetic Booking: Help seniors navigate their foot care needs and book appointments with our nursing team using our proprietary scheduling app.



Lead Management: Proactively follow up on missed calls and voi
s to ensure every patient is cared for.



2. Strategic Logistics & Route Optimization



Travel Fee Management: Our app automatically calculates travel expenses. Your job is to strategically schedule patients in "clusters" to trigger the lowest possible travel fees for the clients.



Nurse Operations: Assist our 7 mobile nurses in setting their daily "Base of Operations" within the app to optimize their routes and increase their booking capacity.



Proactive Filling: Monitor nurse schedules for gaps. You will reach out to past patients in specific geographic areas to fill empty slots and maximize nurse productivity.



3. Local SEO & Google Business Profile (GBP) Management



Multi-City Management: Set up and optimize Google Business Profile listings for the various cities we serve.



Local SEO Maintenance: Ensure "NAP" (Name, Address, Phone) consistency across all listings.



Review Management: Monitor and respond to patient reviews with a warm, professional tone.



Google Posts: Create weekly updates on GBP to highlight local availability, travel fee discounts, and foot care tips.



4. Niche Social Media Management



Content Execution: Turn provided foot care tips, app improvements, and other content into professional posts for
 and Instagram (3-4 times per week) using Canva.



Engagement: Monitor and reply to community comments and direct messages.



5. Technical QA (As Needed)



App Testing: Act as our internal Quality Assurance tester. As you use the app for scheduling, document any bugs or user-experience issues with screenshots or recordings (Loom).



Requirements



Perfect Verbal Clarity: A neutral, very clear English accent is mandatory. You must be able to adjust your speaking pace for hard-of-hearing seniors.



Logistics Mindset: You enjoy "Tetris-style" scheduling and finding the most efficient way to organize a map.



Local SEO Knowledge: Experience managing Google Business Profiles (claiming, verifying, and optimizing) is a strong plus.



Tech Proficiency: Proficient in Canva, Meta Business Suite, and Google Workspace.



Medical/Healthcare Background: Previous experience in US healthcare admin or medical billing is highly preferred.



Reliability: High-speed internet with a backup power/data plan. Comfortable working the graveyard shift (PST hours).



How to Apply (MANDATORY)



To be considered, you must submit a 30-second voice recording (Vocaroo or similar) reading the following script:



"Hello! Thank you for calling our foot care clinic. My name is [Your Name]. I see that Nurse Jenny is going to be in your neighborhood this Wednesday. If we schedule you for 2:00 PM, I can actually reduce your travel fee because she is already in the area. Would that work for you?"



Applications without a voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Web Designer
description:
Job Posting: Web Designer at ProViaXX



ProViaXX is currently seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Web Designer to join our growing team. As we continue to expand our digital footprint, we require a professional who possesses the technical acumen to build sophisticated, high-performance websites from the ground up. Unlike designers who rely solely on drag-and-drop page builders, our ideal candidate understands the underlying architecture of the web and is proficient in manual coding.



Role Requirements and Responsibilities

The successful candidate will be responsible for the full lifecycle of web development, from initial wireframing and visual design to the implementation of clean, semantic code. You must demonstrate a mastery of core web technologies, specifically HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript, as these are the foundational pillars of modern web architecture. A deep understanding of responsive design principles is essential to ensure that our digital assets function seamlessly across all devices and screen sizes. Furthermore, you should be comfortable working with server-side scripting and database management, as our projects often require dynamic content integration.



Application Instructions

If you are a self-motivated developer who thrives on solving complex technical challenges and creating intuitive user experiences, we want to hear from you. To apply for this position, please submit your response to this listing. You must include your active WhatsApp number in your reply. Our hiring team will review your qualifications and reach out via WhatsApp to schedule an initial over-the-phone interview. We look forward to seeing your portfolio and discussing how your coding expertise can contribute to the future of ProViaXX.

title: Sales Representative (Closer / Sales Associate – Overflow Sales)
description:
Company: Core Mind Technology

Supported Brands: Jennings Marketing Solutions, with potential support for other sister companies

Employment Type: Full-time

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: US hours



About the Role

Core Mind Technology is hiring a Sales Representative (Closer / Sales Associate) to support inbound and outbound sales efforts across our marketing agency and related brands. This role focuses on handling qualified sales conversations, running discovery and closing calls, and moving opportunities through the pipeline with strong follow-through and documentation.

This position is ideal for a confident communicator who is comfortable leading sales conversations, qualifying prospects, and closing deals while working closely with a distributed team.



Key Responsibilities

Sales & Client Acquisition

- Handle inbound sales calls and follow up with warm and qualified leads

- Conduct outbound prospecting when needed via calls,
, and social follow-ups

- Schedule, confirm, and run discovery and sales calls

- Qualify prospects based on needs, budget, timeline, and decision-makers

- Clearly explain service offerings and value propositions

- Address objections and guide prospects toward close



Pipeline & Process Management

- Maintain accurate records of calls, notes, and outcomes in the CRM

- Ensure timely follow-ups and smooth handoff to onboarding or fulfillment teams

- Coordinate with internal tea
mbers to ensure proposals are created and delivered

- Follow the established sales process consistently



Collaboration & Communication

- Attend required sales meetings and scheduled sales calls

- Coordinate with tea
mbers on active deals and next steps

- Work with the retention and renewals workflow team to support long-term client success

- Ask for support or guidance from leadership as needed



Performance Expectations based off 20 call per week

Weeks 1 and 2:

- Learn the offer assigned and perfect your sales flow

- Target at least 60% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 2 total closed deals in your first 2 weeks

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 3 and 4:

- Target at least 70% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target at least 2 closed deals per week (4 total)

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 5 through 8:

- Target 80% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 3 - 5 closed deals per week

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks on all offers trained on

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



Weeks 9 through 12:

- Target 80% advance to a second call if not closed

- Target 3 - 5 total closed deals

- Learn a new offer after 20% close ratio is maintained for 2 weeks on all offers trained on

- Work with leadership to funnel the offers with higher close ratio to applicable tea
mbers.

- Performance below expectations will be supported with coaching, call reviews, and process adjustments



What We’re Looking For

- Experience in hight ticket sales, closing, appointment setting, or client acquisition

- Strong phone and zoom presence and confidence leading sales conversations

- Organized, reliable, and consistent with follow-ups

- Ability to quickly learn offers and communicate value clearly

- Comfortable suggested improvements to leadership to improve processes

- Self-driven and comfortable working remotely



Nice to Have

- Experience selling marketing services, AI systems, consulting services, and Software

- Familiarity with Close CRM, Slack, Notion, and Asana

- Experience with Zoom, Google Meet, calendars, and basic reporting



Compensation & Incentives

- Base Pay: Up to $400 monthly salary (paid for completing required daily, weekly and monthly SR duties and follow up activities) {SRs who fail to complete 3 weeks of tasks and requirements will not qualify for base pay}

- Paid Time off for all 18 Philippines Holidays (If all SDI activities are completed or on track)

- Unlimited Paid Time Off (If all SDI activities are on track, completed or able to be reassigned) {Unless Abused}



Commissions Offerings

- 10% on first month revenue closed and 3% on first months two through six of revenue collected (if client is retained)



Performance Bonus Opportunities:

- Bonuses based on retention of closed sales

- Bonuses based off number of close sales per month



Benefits after 90 days with the company:

- Company Funded Healthcare Plan

- Company Funded Macbook Air/Pro

- Company Funded Battery Back Up System (To prevent/minimize interruptions during power outages)

- Company Funded Internet Service

- Profit Share Pool Qualification



How to Apply

Please submit:

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short introduction (2–5 sentences) highlighting your sales experience

- Optional: a short voice note or video introduction

title: Sales Internship (SDR/Cold Caller/Outbound)
description:
Company: Core Mind Technology Inc

Employment Type: Internship

Work Setup: Remote

Schedule: 9/10pm - 6/7am PST (8am - 5pm Central Time USA) {Daylight Savings Shifts the schedule 2 times per year}



About the Role

Core Mind Technology is hiring for a Sales Development Internship (SDI) to support outbound sales efforts by generating and qualifying opportunities for our Sales Representatives/Closers. This role is focused on cold outreach, appointment setting, and early-stage qualification through phone,
, and LinkedIn engagement.

The SDI plays a critical role at the top of the funnel—creating opportunities, booking qualified meetings, and ensuring a steady flow of prospects into the sales pipeline. 



This internship will last between 16 and 26 weeks. The graduation of the internship is solely based on the intern's performance and ability to complete tasks in the amount of time allocated. There is a fast tract graduation as well if the intern generates a specific amount of revenue for the company as well



Key Responsibilities

- Outbound Prospecting & Appointment Setting

- Conduct outbound calling to targeted leads

- Book qualified discovery or sales calls for Sales Representatives/Closers

- Set up an onboarding call with an interested prospect while collecting the deposit

- Engage prospects through outbound
 and LinkedIn messaging

- Respond to replies from outbound campaigns and manage follow-up conversations



Lead Qualification & Handoff

- Qualify prospects based on basic fit, interest, and readiness

- Clearly document notes, context, and next steps before passing leads to the closer

- Ensure smooth handoff of qualified opportunities to the Sales Representative



Campaign & Outreach Support

- Act as the primary point person for LinkedIn and
 reply management

- Ensure outbound campaigns are running correctly and as intended (high-level monitoring)

- Provide feedback on messaging effectiveness and lead quality



Collaboration & Process

- Coordinate closely with Sales Representatives / Closers on active opportunities

- Align daily outreach efforts with sales goals and pipeline needs

- Follow established outbound and qualification processes consistently



What We’re Looking For

- Strong desire to succeed in outbound sales, cold calling, or appointment setting

- Comfortable with outbound volume calling and direct prospect conversations

- Strong communication and rapport-building skills

- Organized with follow-ups, notes, and lead handoffs

- Self-motivated and able to work independently in a remote environment



Nice to Have

- Experience selling or prospecting for high ticket products or service/solutions based businesses (no physical product)

- Familiarity with CRMs, dialers, and outreach tools

- Experience with LinkedIn outreach and
 campaign tools



Compensation & Incentives

- Base Pay: $200 monthly salary (paid for completing required daily, weekly and monthly SDI duties and outreach activities) {interns who fail to complete 3 weeks of tasks and requirements will not qualify for base pay}

- Paid Time off for all 18 Philippines Holidays (If all SDI activities are completed or on track)

- Unlimited Paid Time Off (If all SDI activities are on track, completed or able to be reassigned) {Unless Abused}



Bonus Opportunities:

- Performance-based bonuses may be offered based on appointments booked, show rate, or revenue generated

- Training & Growth:

- Sales training, scripts, and ongoing support provided



Graduation Incentives (Assuming transition to a full time role):

- Clear growth path into Inbound Sales Representative/Closer roles after graduation (Higher Compensation)

- Company Funded Healthcare Plan

- Company Funded Macbook Air/Pro

- Company Funded Battery Back Up System (To prevent/minimize interruptions during power outages) 

- Company Funded Internet Service 



How to Apply

Please submit:

- Your resume or LinkedIn profile

- A short introduction (2–5 sentences) outlining your outbound or SDI experience

- Optional: a short voice note or video introduction

title: Graphic Designer
description:
About the Role



We at JVDB Studios are looking for a Graphic Designer who can bring our commercial story to life through compelling visual assets. This role focuses on creating high-impact sales and marketing materials that not only look visually strong but also drive conversions.



You will work closely with our sales and marketing teams to translate complex ideas into clear, persuasive, and engaging visuals. This is a role for someone who understands that design is not just about aesthetics, but about communication and results.



What You’ll Do



You will design and optimize pitch decks, one-pagers, case studies, proposals, and other digital assets that support sales and marketing initiatives. You will be responsible for turning raw ideas and messaging into polished, professional visuals that align with our brand and improve how we present to clients. Part of your role will also involve improving existing materials to make them more effective, clearer, and more conversion-focused.



What We’re Looking For



We are looking for someone with proven experience in graphic design, particularly in creating sales and marketing materials. You should have a strong portfolio that clearly demonstrates your ability to produce high-quality, professional work. A strong eye for layout, typography, and branding is essential, along with the ability to simplify complex information into visually engaging content.



You should be comfortable using tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Figma, or similar platforms, and be able to work independently while delivering on time.



Important Requirement



We are specifically looking for candidates with proven experience and strong samples of work. Your portfolio is a key part of your application and should showcase real projects that demonstrate your design capability and effectiveness.



Engagement Details



This is a freelance contractor role with pay structured per project, depending on scope and experience. The schedule is flexible, and the role is fully remote.



Why Join JVDB Studios



You will be working with a fast-growing and creative team, with the flexibility to manage your own time and the opportunity for ongoing projects. This role also offers direct collaboration with a European company and exposure to impactful commercial work.



How to Apply



Send your resume, portfolio, and live project links to:







Subject line: JVDB GRAPHIC DESIGNER

title: 24 HR Review | VA Remote Virtual Receptionist
description:
Important: Our application process moves quickly. If you are selected to proceed to the next interview stages, you must be able to respond promptly. Candidates who do not respond in a timely manner may be passed over.



We are currently seeking a Remote Spa Receptionist to manage inbound calls and book spa appointments. This is a long-term, performance-based position. Calls are recorded and reviewed regularly. Continued placement in this role depends on accuracy, professionalism, booking success, reliable attendance, no missed calls during scheduled shifts, quick response times, and the ability to professionally manage complaints and de-escalate dissatisfied clients.



To apply: Please copy the questions below, paste them into your reply, and answer each question thoroughly.



(1) Location & Utilities: Where in the Philippines are you currently located? How often have you experienced power or internet outages in the past year? Do you have backup solutions (e.g., generator, mobile hotspot) to ensure your work is not affected?



(2) Home Setup: Will you be working from home? Is your workspace quiet and suitable for handling calls? Do you have your own computer or laptop? Please attach a screenshot of your current internet speed.



(3) Availability & Speed: Can you consistently work seven days a week, six hours per day, and remain available for the full shift without missed calls? How quickly do you typically answer inbound calls? What is your current typing speed in words per minute?



(4) Call & Complaint Experience: Describe your experience with answering inbound calls, booking or scheduling appointments, customer service, following scripts, and handling complaints. Provide one real example of how you de-escalated an upset client and the outcome.



(5) Tools & Systems: What programs, tools, phone systems, or VoIP platforms have you used for handling calls? Do you have any issues with background noise, power outages, or internet interruptions? How do you take notes and log client interactions during calls?



(6) Voice Recordings: Please submit two short voice recordings. Recording one should demonstrate booking an appointment from 7:00 PM to 8:00 PM with a total amount of $60. Recording two should demonstrate handling a double charge for a 90-minute massage where the client sees two $90 charges and is requesting a refund. Your tone should be calm, polite, and professional.



(7) Current Job: Do you currently have another job? If yes, where, how many hours per week, and what are your roles and tasks in that job?



(8) Schedule, Pay & Start Date: Are you able to work seven days a week, six hours per day, during Central Standard Time (CST) hours without conflicts? What is your expected hourly or monthly rate? What is your earliest physical start date if hired?



(9) Marketing, Design & Video: Do you have experience with online marketing, creating content using Canva, or producing short video clips such as
 Reels or similar platforms? Please describe your skills and provide samples of your previous work if available.



(10) Fit, Skills & Experience: Briefly introduce yourself and explain why you would be a good fit for this role. Include what you believe is most important when handling spa clients over the phone, especially during complaints, and what other skills or areas you have a lot of experience in.

title: Project Manager
description:
Job Title: Project Manager (PMP Certified - not mandatory)

Company: Lyfe Hardware LLC (
)

Location: Remote

Schedule: Flexible but EST Overlap Required

Experience: 10-12 Years

Industry: E-commerce, Architectural Hardware

Compensation: Competitive (based on experience)



About Lyfe Hardware

Lyfe Hardware is a fast-growing US-based ecommerce brand in the home improvement and architectural hardware category. We focus on combining great design, seamless operations, and high-quality customer experience. 

As we continue scaling across channels like Shopify, Amazon, and major marketplaces, we’re seeking an experienced Agile Project Manager to provide clear leadership, drive strategic initiatives, and establish project frameworks that enable teams to deliver with speed and discipline.





Role Overview

The Project Manager will own the end-to-end project lifecycle, drive cross-functional alignment, and ensure the smooth execution of initiatives across ecommerce, operations, marketing, catalogue, and product teams. This role requires a highly structured thinker, strong communication, a deep understanding of P
thodologies, and hands-on leadership in a fast-scaling environment.

This person will be reporting directly to the founders. It is also a leadership role.



Key Responsibilities

???? Project Leadership & Execution

Lead planning, execution, and delivery of company-wide projects across ecommerce, fulfilment, catalogue, and product functions.

Build clear project scopes, timelines, requirements, and communication plans from zero.

Define project milestones, prioritise tasks, mitigate risks, and unblock teams in real time.

Conduct cross-functional stand-ups, sprint planning, and retrospectives using Agile methods.

???? PMO & Process Ownership

Build standardised PM frameworks, templates, and project governance processes from scratch.

Establish reporting structures, dashboards, and tracking mechanisms for leadership visibility.

Develop and maintain project documentation and improve existing SOPs.

Implement best practices aligned with PMI standards.

???? Cross-functional Collaboration

Coordinate across ecommerce, operations, catalogue, logistics, creative, and support teams.

Translate business goals into actionable project plans with clear ownership.

Ensure cross-team communication remains transparent, consistent, and deadline-driven.

???? Tools, Automation & Efficiency

Manage projects through Asana or similar PM tools.

Identify workflow inefficiencies and recommend automation opportunities (Zapier, Make, AI tools, N8N).

???? Stakeholder & Leadership Management

Partner directly with founders and department heads to prioritise initiatives.

Provide weekly project status updates, risk logs, and execution insights to leadership.

Manage internal contributors, contractors, and cross-functional project squads.

???? Quality, Risk & Delivery Assurance

Anticipate risks and proactively build mitigation plans.

Ensure every project is delivered on time, within scope, and aligned with business goals.

Maintain strict version control and change management practices.



What We’re Looking For

Must-Haves

10+ years of experience in project management, PMO, or cross-functional leadership roles.

PMP certification (mandatory).

Proven success in E-commerce, or marketplace experience (Shopify, Amazon, Wayfair, Walmart).

Strong experience building PM structures, SOPs, and governance systems.

Expertise with PM tools (Asana preferred).

title: Senior Design Engineer
description:

Location: Remote

Industry: Architectural Hardware / Manufacturing

Work Schedule: 9:00 am – 5:00 pm EST

About Us

We are a fast-growing company specializing in high-quality architectural hardware — including railings, Lucite/Acrylic, iron door handles, and fully custom-designed products. Our work spans both standard and bespoke projects, with a focus on precision engineering, manufacturing efficiency, and design innovation.

Position Overview

We’re looking for a skilled Technical Design Engineer with deep experience in architectural hardware and direct exposure to US-based clients or companies. This is a full-time, remote role ideal for someone with 7+ years in product or technical design, strong communication skills, and comfort working independently across global teams.

???? Please note: You will be required to use your own laptop or desktop with reliable internet and CAD capabilities.

???? Prior experience working directly with US clients is mandatory.

Key Responsibilities

???? Product Design & Engineering

Create detailed CAD drawings and 3D models (AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, etc.)





Ensure all designs meet structural, functional, and aesthetic standards





Conduct basic stress/load analysis to validate product strength





Design for cost-effective manufacturing (e.g., casting, CNC, stamping)





???? Estimation Support

Assist in preparing design-based estimations for custom or large-scale projects





Coordinate with internal and factory teams to align on feasibility and cost drivers





???? Technical Documentation & Factory Coordination

Create and maintain BOMs, assembly instructions, and tolerance specifications





Collaborate with factories to resolve production-related design queries





Ensure accuracy and version control across all design files





???? Custom Order Engineering

Create or adapt drawings based on US client-specific dimensions or configurations





Engineer custom solutions ensuring proper load distribution and installation feasibility





Provide technical clarification during sales or execution, as needed





???? New Product Development 

Occasionally assist with prototyping and detailing of new product ideas





Translate rough concepts into basic technical drawings or sketches





Must-Have Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in Civil, Mechanical, or Industrial Design Engineering





Minimum 5 years of relevant experience (hardware, furniture, metalwork, etc.)





Strong proficiency in AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, or similar tools





Familiarity with fabrication techniques (metal, Lucite/acrylic, wood, glass)





Ability to independently manage drawings, specs, and technical communication





Prior experience working directly with US-based clients





Fluent in English (verbal & written)





Must have your own system + stable internet suitable for CAD work





Bonus Points For:

Experience preparing cost/effort estimates





Exposure to sales or client-facing technical support





Experience with factories or vendors for custom fabrication





Knowledge of NPD workflows and design iteration





What We Offer

Competitive pay (based on experience)





Flexible, fully remote work environment





Ownership over diverse and high-impact projects





Collaborative, execution-focused culture





Long-term growth potential within a growing product + ops team

title: Customer Support Executive (American Accent)
description:
Customer Support Specialist (American Accent) – eCommerce Team



Overview:

Lyfe Hardware is seeking a dedicated and customer-focused individual to join our growing eCommerce team. As a Customer Support Specialist, you will play a crucial role in ensuring a seamless customer experience for our online hardware fittings and railing business. This role involves direct interaction with customers and distributors, addressing inquiries, resolving issues, and supporting backend eCommerce operations. We are looking for someone with a strong technical background and a genuine passion for delivering outstanding customer service.



Location: Remote



Primary Responsibilities:

Customer Support: Provide exceptional customer service via phone,
, and chat, addressing inquiries about products, order status, pricing, and availability.

Problem Resolution: Efficiently solve customer and distributor issues, ensuring the best possible outcomes while maintaining high levels of customer satisfaction.

Order Management: Handle order processing, listing creation, optimization, and inventory management across multiple eCommerce platforms.

etings, presenting insights into customer trends and making actionable recommendations for service enhancements.

mbers.

Collaborative Spirit: Able to build and maintain strong, collaborative relationships with customers and internal teams.

Flexibility: Willingness to take on new responsibilities and adapt to changing business needs.



Benefits:

Inclusive Culture: A collaborative and supportive work environment where your ideas and contributions are valued.

title: Technical Design Engineer
description:
Job Description: Technical Design Engineer (Architectural Hardware)



Location: Remote

Industry: Architectural Hardware / Manufacturing



About Us



We are a fast-growing company specializing in high-quality architectural hardware including railings, Lucite/Acrylic, iron door handles, and fully custom-designed hardware. Our work spans both standard and bespoke projects, and we prioritize precision engineering, manufacturing efficiency, and design innovation.



Position Overview



We’re looking for a skilled and experienced Technical Design Engineer with a strong background in architectural hardware and new product development (NPD). This role is ideal for someone with at least 5 years of experience in product design and engineering, particularly in hardware or related sectors.



The candidate should be able to independently generate factory-ready technical drawings, validate load-bearing aspects of their designs, and collaborate effectively with production teams for smooth handover to manufacturing.



Key Responsibilities

???? Product Design & Engineering



Create detailed CAD drawings and 3D models (AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, etc.) for new and existing architectural hardware products







Ensure designs meet structural, functional, and aesthetic standards







Conduct basic load-bearing and stress analysis to validate design strength







Design with consideration for cost-effective manufacturing, including casting, stamping, CNC machining, and other relevant processes







???? New Product Development (NPD)



Support the conceptualization, prototyping, and detailing of new product lines







Translate product ideas into manufacturable technical designs and production-ready documentation







Iterate on designs based on test feedback, feasibility checks, or customer inputs







???? Technical Documentation & Factory Coordination



Prepare and maintain assembly instructions, technical specifications, BOMs, and tolerance standards







Serve as a key technical point of contact for factory teams, helping resolve design-related queries during production







Ensure proper version control and drawing accuracy across all files







???? Custom Order Engineering



Create or adapt drawings for custom orders based on client-specific dimensions or configurations







Ensure all custom solutions are engineered with sound load distribution and installation feasibility







Support client-facing teams with any technical clarifications needed during sales or execution phases







Qualifications



Bachelor’s degree in Civil, Mechanical, or Industrial Design Engineering







Minimum 5 years of experience as a Design Engineer in architectural hardware, metalwork, furniture, or related manufacturing fields







Proficiency in AutoCAD, Inventor, SolidWorks, or similar CAD tools







Strong understanding of structural loads, support systems, and mechanical connections







Familiarity with metal, glass, and wood fabrication techniques







Excellent communication and documentation skills







Highly organized, reliable, and solution-oriented







Preferred Qualifications



Hands-on experience with new product development (NPD)







Prior experience with custom fabrication and manufacturing coordination







Exposure to client communication or technical support in a hardware/product environment







Ability to work independently with remote teams and across time zones







What We Offer



Competitive compensation based on experience







Flexible remote working environment







Opportunities to work on diverse and high-impact design projects







Collaborative team culture with a focus on quality and execution







Long-term growth potential across technical and operational roles

title: Part-Time Bookkeeper / CPA (QBO Cleanup + Tax Support – U.S. Clients)
description:
Remote | Must align with U.S. team working hours (with future flexibility)(potential full-time opportunity available)



Immediate Need – Production Role



Our bookkeeping team is currently at capacity.



We are hiring 1 experienced bookkeeper or CPA who can step in immediately and handle multi-year cleanup, reconciliation, and tax-ready financials without handholding.



This is a production role, not a training role.



NON-NEGOTIABLE REQUIREMENTS (READ BEFORE APPLYING)



You must:



Have real experience with U.S. bookkeeping clients

Be able to work during U.S. business hours (Central Time)

Be proficient in QuickBooks Online (QBO)

Be proactive and able to take initiative



Future flexibility may be available after proven performance



If you do not meet ALL of these, please do not apply.



About Harvest AF



Harvest AF is a U.S.-based financial consulting firm focused on:



• Tax strategy

• Bookkeeping & cleanup

• Financial clarity for business owners



We operate as a financial ministry, dedicated to serving others with integrity, excellence, and stewardship.



We believe:

When finances are structured properly, people can better serve their families, communities, and purpose.



Our work is not just about numbers — it’s about impact, responsibility, and service.



We operate with:

Urgency

Structure

Accountability



You will be working in a CPA-reviewed system, where accuracy directly impacts real people and businesses.



Your Mission



Clean up and stabilize client books so they are:



Accurate

Organized

Ready for tax preparation and planning



So our clients can steward their finances well.



Real Client Scenario (Multi-Year Cleanup Work)



You may be assigned clients with:



• 1–3 years of unclean books

• Thousands of uncategorized transactions

• Bank accounts not reconciled for multiple years

• Missing or inconsistent vendor names

• Duplicate or missing entries

• Personal and business expenses mixed together

• Disorganized Chart of Accounts



Your Responsibility in This Scenario



You will:



Clean and categorize transactions across multiple years

Standardize vendor names (no blanks)

Remove duplicates and fix errors

Reconcile accounts month-by-month until fully caught up

Separate business vs personal expenses correctly

Organize Chart of Accounts logically

Flag missing or unclear information



How We Expect You to Work



Work chronologically (month-by-month)

Reconcile as you go (not at the end)

Use QBO tools efficiently (rules, bulk upload, etc.)

Think through problems before asking questions

Communicate issues clearly



Tax Awareness & Cross-Team Collaboration (CRITICAL)



You will work closely with our tax planning and tax preparation team.



You are not expected to be a tax expert — but you must understand how bookkeeping impacts tax outcomes.



In practice, you will:



Ensure financials are accurate for tax filing

Properly record assets and major purchases

Support depreciation and expense strategies

Flag transactions that impact:



Depreciation

Section 179 / large purchases

Owner distributions

Business vs personal classification



Deliver tax-ready financials to our CPA/EA team



DO NOT APPLY IF:



• You need training on QBO

• You cannot align with U.S. working hours

• You rely on instructions for every step

• You have never handled cleanup work

• You only do basic data entry bookkeeping



IDEAL CANDIDATE



• Experienced with multi-year cleanup work

• Strong QBO user (including bulk tools)

• Detail-oriented and fast

• Thinks independently

• Communicates clearly

• Understands how bookkeeping impacts taxes



What Success Looks Like



Reconciliations tie out to the penny

Cleanup completed within 7–10 days (per phase)

Less than 1% corrections after QA

Issues identified and resolved proactively



Why Work With Us



• Long-term opportunity

• Stable workload

• CPA-reviewed system (you’ll grow fast)

• Opportunity for increased pay based on performance and experience

• Potential for more flexible schedule over time

• Faith-driven, purpose-centered team

• Work that directly impacts people and businesses



How to Apply



Subject Line:

Bookkeeper Application – [Your Name]



Include:

Your experience with U.S. bookkeeping clients

Tools you’ve used (QBO required)

Example of a cleanup project:

What was wrong

What you fixed

Final result

Your current working hours (your local time)

Confirm your ability to align with U.S. hours



REQUIRED QUESTIONS (MUST ANSWER)



1 What is the first thing you check when starting a bookkeeping cleanup and why?



2 If you are given 2 years of unclean books, what is your step-by-step approach?



3 How do you handle large purchases (equipment, vehicles, etc.), and why does it matter for taxes?



Hiring Process



• Application Review

• Paid Trial Task (real client work)

• Decision within 48 hours



We move fast.



IMPORTANT



If you are not confident handling multi-year cleanup independently, this role is not a fit.

description:
Talent Sourcer (Remote – For Property Management) ASAP



We are a growing U.S.-based real estate company managing a large multi-state portfolio. We are currently building a strong team and systems to support our continued growth, and we are looking for a Recruiter / Talent Sourcer to help us hire top talent.



This is not an admin role. We are looking for someone who can actively source, screen, and deliver high-quality candidates—not just post job ads. All the applicants you will look will be related to Property Management roles both US onsite and Remote position



Qualifications

Must have experience recruiting on-site US-based candidates

Preferabbly (e.g., property management roles like property managers, maintenance staff).



Proven experience in remote recruitment (Philippines or global).

Strong experience sourcing candidates from:

OnlineJobs.ph (OLJ)

Indeed

LinkedIn

Customer Support

Operations / Admin

description:
Hiring for part-time work for a Capcut / TikTok editor



You will be making TikTok videos using Capcup or the video editing software of your choice. The editing process is fairly simple and straightforward. Anyone who is proficient in video editing should have no problem with the basic tasks such as:

- Cutting dead space in talking head videos

- Adding overlay images on screen in the videos

- Minor effects such as dynamic zoom, cropping, etc.

- Producing b-roll content from voiceover and footage provided, having the ability to digest what is being said and pair up the audio with corresponding footage



Please review a few examples of my content to ensure you are familiar and comfortable with the editing style:

1. Basic talking head - here you are mostly editing dead space and piecing clips together, adding minor effects like crop and zoom to make the frames look more dynamic and seamless.
. Talking head with overlays - same as before, but adding images provided to you on the screen to support what is being said in the video.
. B-roll content - you will be provided a voice over and need to work through the footage to find fitting visuals. A strong understanding of English and social media content is crucial here.

----------



You will be working hand in hand with me on an extremely viral social media page and there is room for bonuses if deadlines are met and the content performs well!



Requirements:

- Attention to detail

- STRONG English

- Strong internet connection

- Previous experience with Capcut / TikTok / Instagram

- Good working with a team

- Ability to learn and take constructive feedback

- Availability to work 2-3h a day (with potential for more and increased salary)- Able to work 5-6 days per week (can take days off whenever as long as mostly consistent)



- Can take payments through Wise

- PH or similar time zone

title: Lead/Acquisition Manager - Land investing
description:
Role will receive salary AND commission



Key Responsibilities



- Conduct Call 1s with qualified sellers: anchor pricing using proven frameworks, build rapport, gather remaining property and motivation details, and uncover the seller's target price to assess deal viability.

- Conduct Call 2s: present or refine offers, negotiate final terms, overcome objections, address seller concerns, and close deals by getting purchase agreements signed.

-Ability to reengage older offers

- Review all lead information, due diligence notes, and prior conversation history in Stride CRM before each call to be fully prepared and avoid redundant questions.

- Use Land ID, Land Portal, and supporting tools to verify property details, pull comps, and confirm deal viability during and between calls.

- Structure offers based on BT Land Group's buy box and pricing guidelines—factoring in market value, target spread, close timeline, acreage, and deal size.

- Work closely with the Lead Manager to ensure leads are properly qualified and all necessary information is captured before calls are scheduled.

- Update Stride CRM with detailed call outcomes, negotiation notes, offer details, and deal status after every seller interaction.

- Track personal KPIs including calls taken, offers made, contracts signed, and conversion rates; actively work to improve performance over time.

- Share feedback with leadership on lead quality trends, common seller objections, and market observations to help refine the overall acquisition strategy.



Requirements



- Proven experience in sales, negotiations, or acquisitions—ideally in real estate investing or land (required).

- Strong phone presence: confident, professional, consultative, and able to control the direction and pace of a negotiation call.

- Skilled in negotiation techniques such as anchoring, looping, motivational interviewing, or similar consultative selling approaches.

- Ability to quickly analyze deal economics: market value, offer price, spread, close timeline, and risk factors.

- Comfortable handling objections and guiding sellers through concerns about pricing, process, and timeline with empathy and professionalism.

- Highly organized—able to manage multiple active negotiations at different stages without letting details slip.

- Self-driven, competitive, and results-oriented; motivated by closing deals and exceeding targets.

- Reliable internet connection, a quiet and professional workspace, and availability during U.S. business hours for seller calls.



Preferred Qualifications



- Direct experience in land acquisitions, real estate wholesaling, or land flipping.

- Deep understanding of vacant land valuation: comps, zoning, buildability, road access, utilities, wetlands, flood zones, and slope/terrain analysis.

- Experience using CRM platforms (Stride is bonus) and deal pipeline tracking systems.

- Familiarity with Land ID, Land Portal, or similar property research and due diligence tools.

- Demonstrated track record of closing deals and exceeding acquisition or sales targets in a remote environment.



Compensation & Benefits



- Competitive hourly compensation based on experience and skill level.

- Performance-based bonus structure tied directly to contracts signed, deal volume, and acquisition quality.

- Starts part-time (20–30 hours/week) with a 60-day probationary period. Strong performers will have the opportunity to transition to full-time (40 hours/week).

-Commission will be given after probationary period

- Training on BT Land Group's acquisition process, negotiation frameworks, pricing strategy, and deal structure.

- Significant opportunity for pay growth and expanded bonus potential as deal volume and responsibilities increase.



How to Apply



Interested candidates should submit their resume along with a brief message covering the following:



- A recording of yourself on a call. If you don't have an existing recording, please send a short clip of yourself introducing yourself as if you were speaking to a potential seller for the first time.

- Your favorite food.

- Your relevant experience in sales, negotiations, or real estate acquisitions.



BT Land Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer.

title: Freight Support Specialist
description:
Freight Support Specialist - Ally Logistics



ABOUT ALLY LOGISTICS:

Ally Logistics is a U.S.-based third-party logistics (3PL) company headquartered in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Since 2012, we’ve been committed to creating the ultimate freight shipping experience by operating at the optimal intersection of people and technology.



As a full-service 3PL, we specialize in a wide range of freight solutions, including dry van, refrigerated, drayage, straight truck, open deck/fl atbed, drop-trailer programs, warehousing, and more. Our diverse service capabilities allow us to support shippers across industries with fl exible, reliable, and scalable logistics strategies.

We partner with skilled global talent to support our continued growth and operational excellence, ensuring our customers receive efficient, high-quality service at every step of the supply chain.



ROLE SUMMARY:

We’re looking for a Freight Support Specialist to play a central role across scheduling, operations, and agent support—ensuring freight is built, scheduled, and executed efficiently while all supporting processes (billing, POD collection, and documentation) are completed accurately and on time. This person will serve as a trusted partner to agents, proactively managing loads, resolving issues, and driving end-to-end execution with speed, accuracy, and strong communication, while also supporting occasional cash application, collections, and billing tasks as needed.



JOB DUTIES/RESPONSIBILITIES:

? Build, schedule, and manage shipments in TMS platforms or via
/phone

? Coordinate same-day and next-day freight coverage across multiple equipment types

? Create and manage loads in E2open and other TMS systems

? Maintain accurate shipment visibility through timely system updates (in/out times, status updates)

? Act as a primary point of contact for agents, providing proactive communication and support

? Handle escalations quickly to minimize disruptions and maintain service levels

? Manage POD collection, validation, and uploads to support timely invoicing

? Own billing, cash application, and collections for assigned accounts

? Ensure all loads are closed out accurately with complete documentation

? Support accounts receivable, invoicing, and collections to ensure accurate and timely billing.



COMPENSATION:

Compensation will be determined based on experience & skills.



REQUIRED SKILLS & QUALIFICATIONS:

? Experience in logistics/freight across billing, operations, or scheduling

? Comfortable working in TMS systems and communicating with both customers and agents

? Strong communicator who can confi dently support agents and problem-solve in real time

? Understanding of the full freight lifecycle, including timely appointment scheduling to keep loads moving efficiently



Success in This Role:

? Freight is covered and executed quickly with minimal errors

? Billing and documentation are completed accurately and on time

? Agents receive consistent, high-quality support

? Issues are resolved proactively with minimal impact to operations



Additional Requirements

1. Technology & Equipment Requirements

Reliable high-speed internet and computer

Webcam + microphone for Zoom calls

Quiet, professional workspace



2. Availability Requirements

Ability to work U.S. Eastern Time

Must provide advanced notice for planned time off

Must maintain consistent communication (Slack responsiveness,
, etc.)

title: SDR/BDR/Cold Calling Trainer | SDR/BDR Training Specialist | SDR/BDR Onboarding Specialist
description:
About Us

StoryGen (storygen.agency) is a fast-growing B2B lead generation agency that builds and manages outbound sales teams for our clients. Our specialty is cold calling, supported by tight operations, automations, and AI-driven tools.

Behind every high-performing BDR team is strong onboarding, structured training, and consistent coaching. That’s where you come in.



About the Role

As an Operations Associate for BDR Training and Enablement, you will be responsible for onboarding new Business Development Representatives (BDRs), training them on cold calling frameworks, and ensuring they are fully prepared to book and hold qualified meetings for our clients.



This role is performance-focused. Your success will be measured by how quickly new BDRs ramp, how consistently they execute scripts and processes, and how effectively they book and hold meetings.

You will work closely with BDRs, Account Managers, and leadership to ensure consistent performance standards across the team.



This role is ideal for someone confident in coaching others, comfortable leading training sessions, and passionate about developing people even if your experience comes from school, internships, or volunteer work.



What You’ll Do

1. BDR Onboarding & Ramp-Up

Lead onboarding sessions for new BDRs

Train new hires on cold calling frameworks, scripts, and call structure

Walk BDRs/Cold Callers through tools, workflows, and dialing processes

Ensure new BDRs understand KPIs, performance expectations, and quality standards

Monitor early-stage performance and provide structured feedback

Ensure BDRs are fully ramped and confident before independent execution



2. Call Coaching & Performance Development

Listen to call recordings and provide constructive feedback

Coach BDRs/Cold Callers on objection handling, tonality, confidence, and structure

Reinforce script adherence while improving personalization and delivery

Identify skill gaps and develop improvement plans

Work with underperforming BDRs to improve booking and hold rates

Ensure consistency in call quality across the team



3. Training Materials & Documentation Development

Develop and update training materials for BDR/Cold Caller onboarding

Create structured training guides, call frameworks, and objection-handling resources

Maintain updated script libraries and best-practice documents

Improve onboarding documentation as processes evolve

Build repeatable training systems that shorten ramp time



4. Continuous Improvement & Team Enablement

Collaborate with leadership on improving training systems

Support implementation of AI call review tools and coaching workflows

Identify recurring performance trends and recommend improvements

Help build a scalable BDR/Cold Caller training framework as the team grows



What We’re Looking For

- We are open to fresh graduates and candidates without formal work experience, as long as you can demonstrate strong coaching, training, or leadership experience (e.g., in university, student organizations, internships, or volunteer work).

- Strong interpersonal and communication skills

- Demonstrated ability to coach, mentor, or train others

- Leadership experience (formal or informal)

- Team-oriented mindset and ability to collaborate closely with others

- Confident communicator and natural coach

- Comfortable giving direct but constructive feedback

- Organized and structured in training delivery

- Performance-oriented mindset

- Strong documentation and material-building ability

- Positive, motivating presence with high accountability standards



Work Schedule

- Full-time role

- Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern Time

- Must be available during U.S. Eastern Time business hours



Compensation & Benefits

- USD 1000 base pay + performance-based incentives

- 100% remote

- Direct impact on team performance and revenue growth

- Opportunity to shape and build the company’s BDR training framework

- Growth path into Enablement Lead or Performance Manager roles

- Collaborative, fast-paced team environment



How to Apply

To ensure a fair and unbiased hiring process, all applicants must complete the assessment then submit the following in the same link:



- Your resume

- A link to your internet speed test

- A short Loom audio recording. Prepare and configure Loom in advance before starting the assessment (guide questions are provided in the same link)



Apply here:

title: Full-Stack WordPress Developer and Designer for our Web Design Agency
description:
Company Overview:

We are a stable and longer term Web Design & Digital Agency located in the United States. With a comprehensive suite of services, we aim to save small businesses both time and money. We have over a decade of experience and have garnered stellar reviews from our satisfied clientele. We are on a mission to improve online presence for businesses and are looking for a dedicated individual to join our team and contribute to our vision.



Job Description:

We are looking for a versatile Full-Stack WordPress Developer and Designer to join our team. This role requires a balance of skills in both web development and design. We’re looking for someone with a strong technical skill set who can go beyond design and handle more advanced website functionality. This includes working with WordPress, customizing plugins, implementing integrations, and making code-level adjustments when needed. You'll also be performing website maintenance, and basic hosting management on Plesk.  About 35% of your time will be spent in Web Design, 45% in Development/Technical, and 20% in administrative tasks related to WordPress web design. You'll be working directly with clients in our Helpdesk, so proven customer service and English communication skills are a must.



This is a long-term opportunity to work with a 23 year old web design agency.



You need to have an eye for design and have already established the skills to produce beautiful design work for small business websites and can handle publishing and working with Elementor well to be good at this job.



You must have great organizational skills and decision making abilities. As you will be working with our US design team, you need to have excellent English writing, spelling, and punctuation is a must since you will be working in customer websites.



Our focus is on a quality candidate is your ability, passion, and desire to always improve. We are a fast paced company with a professional and positive environment where our teams work together, roll up their sleeves and pitch in with whatever is needed. You will prioritize your workload to meet deadlines and work objectives.



There is a large opportunity for growth and role expansion as we are a well established digital marketing company and looking to expand our small but talented team of designers and developers.



Experience with Elementor alone is not sufficient without technical problem-solving ability.



Key Responsibilities:



• Build, update, and maintain WordPress websites with a focus on both functionality and user experience.

• Handle technical WordPress tasks including plugin setup, customization, troubleshooting, and third-party integrations.

• Troubleshoot and resolve website issues related to performance, functionality, compatibility, and plugin conflicts.

• Work within WordPress hosting environments, including basic Plesk tasks, domain settings, DNS,
, SSL, and site migrations.

• Make front-end updates and light code-level adjustments using HTML, CSS, and other web technologies as needed.

• Collaborate with clients and internal tea
mbers to implement updates, solve problems, and deliver polished web solutions.

• Respond to client requests and support tickets clearly, professionally, and in a timely manner.

• Help document processes, improve SOPs, and support internal workflows related to website management and development.



Qualifications:



• 5+ years of professional experience in WordPress development and design.

• Proficiency in Elementor and a strong portfolio showcasing your design skills.

• Solid understanding of web development principles, including experience with troubleshooting plugins and website issues.

• Familiarity with web hosting environments, preferably Plesk.

• Excellent organizational skills, attention to detail, and a team-player attitude.

• Fluent in English with strong communication skills.



Benefits:



• Work-life balance with a 35-hour work week.

• Flexible payment schedule and competitive compensation.

• Opportunities for growth and professional development.

• Bonuses, Paid Time Off, Company Holidays, 13th Month.

• Guaranteed raise schedule on base pay.



Ideally, you are:

- Fluent in English and can type quickly

- Comfortable and proficient communicating with American co-workers.

- Proficient with
, Google Workspace, and Slack is necessary.

- Highly organized, timely & reliable.

- Available to work primarily in our time zone, which is EST.



Application Instructions:



Submit your resume and portfolio through OLJ. Please include the phrase "I AM FULL-STACK" in your proposal to confirm you have read the entire job description.

title: Executive Virtual Assistant for Marketing Agency
description:
About Us

LHM is a performance marketing agency focused on DTC and telehealth brands. We run creative strategy, media buying, landing pages, and full-funnel work. Small, scrappy, growing fast. You'd be reporting directly to the founder.

The Role

I'm looking for a sharp, proactive VA to take a mix of business ops and personal life admin off my plate as the agency scales. Split is roughly 70% business, 30% personal.

This isn't a task-taker role. I want someone who sees what needs to happen before I ask, keeps my life moving, and grows into the role over time. If you need a 10-step SOP for every task, we're not a fit.

What You'll Actually Do

Business (~70%)



Inbox triage and drafting replies in my voice

Scheduling calls with leads, referral partners, and existing clients

Follow-ups on open threads (BD conversations, sales, overdue invoices)

Light CRM hygiene — updating records, tagging leads, keeping the pipeline clean

Coordinating with contractors (creative strategists, designers) on deadlines and deliverables

Onboarding setup for new clients

Invoice tracking and light bookkeeping support

Social posting (LinkedIn, IG) with content direction fro

Ad hoc research



Personal (~30%)



Booking travel, flights, hotels, restaurants

Gift logistics — flowers for my wife, client gifts, holidays

Scheduling appointments

Personal research and buying decisions



Who I'm Looking For



You take initiative. If you see a mess, you clean it without being asked.

You're discreet. You'll see financials, personal info, business strategy. None of it leaves the room.

You can handle a direct communicator. I'm blunt, I curse, I don't wrap feedback in bubble wrap. If that's not your speed, this isn't the role.

You read the full brief before firing off questions.

You care about doing the job right, not just doing it.

You want to be here in 2+ years, not 6 months.



Must-Haves



Fluent written and verbal English

2+ years of EA/VA experience, ideally supporting a founder or small team

Strong calendar and inbox management chops

At least 4 hours daily overlap with US Eastern or Pacific time

Reliable internet and a quiet workspace for calls

Fluent in Gmail, Google Calendar, Google Drive, Slack



Nice-to-Haves



Experience supporting an agency owner or marketing founder

Canva or Figma basics

Familiarity with ClickUp, Notion, or similar PM tools

Short-form video editing (CapCut, Descript)

Social media posting experience

Background in or exposure to DTC / performance marketing / telehealth



Hours & Compensation



30–40 hrs/week to start, flexible

2-week paid trial at $[X] total

Full role at $[Y]/month if it clicks

Surprise bonuses for exceptional work — that's how I operate

Comp increases with scope. I pay above market for people who earn it.



How to Apply

Send three things:



Your resume

A 60–90 second video (phone selfie is fine) answering: "What's a task you took off your last boss's plate that they didn't even know was a problem yet?"

Your timezone and hours of availability



Skip the cover letter. I won't read it.
