title: Salesforce Administrator
description:
COMPANY: MVP MAILHOUSE

Located in Park City, UT, MVP Mailhouse is a leader in direct marketing and analytics that drive ROI, specializing in the dental industry. Read more about MVP Mailhouse’s products and services on our website: 
/.



MVP Mailhouse’s flagship product is direct mail marketing with unexpectedly advanced technology. We track all the phone calls and new customer conversations that our marketing campaigns generate for our customers and help them use that data to increase performance. We have started offering digital ad campaigns on Google and
 to help our customers maximize their growth.



MVP Mailhouse uses proprietary technology including native mobile and web-based applications to make our customer experience more streamlined and effective and to help practices achieve their growth goals.



TEAM: PRODUCT and ENGINEERING

Our development team uses kanban and Scru
thodologies to manage our workflow. Our stack is React for web, Node.js back end, Mongo DB, and several REST APIs for other functionality.



The focus of the product and engineering team is building cross-device compatible user interfaces that communicate effectively and make action painless and instinctual. Our entire team is laser focused on understanding our customers’ problems, preferences, and feedback in order to build a product that they love and helps fuel our company’s growth.



POSITION: SALESFORCE ADMINISTRATOR

The Salesforce Administrator will take part in the design, development, and support of the various platforms in the organization. The position will interact with business users, IT resources, and provide advanced in-depth CRM administration and design. The successful hire will support multiple business divisions and collaborate with stakeholders to shape CRM requirements, integration, and ensure alignment with business and IT strategy.



You will also be responsible for designing the system, training employees on the system, troubleshooting software problems, and making improvements to the system over time.



Our system is based on the following software:



- Salesforce

- GSuite (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, etc)

- Quickbooks

- Zapier



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Help develop and execute the technical roadmap for CRM and system integration, working closely with system users to leverage the platform further to develop and achieve the aim of the CRM and its full integration to the organization’s processes

- Evaluate and configure CRM and other systems

- Training users and creating useful documentation

- Drive user adoption of newly implemented features and functionality; increase the utilization of the CRM through user engagement, develop CRM workflows to support business processes, extract data, produce tailored reports and respond to members’ information requests

- Ensure proper integration of various systems and automation platforms

- Play a strategic consulting role during the planning of various marketing campaigns both at the level of targeting as well as that of business intelligence

- Develop and administer CRM marketing lists, maintaining the data records of all membership engagements and prospective membership including all relevant key contacts, ensuring data supplied is up to date



REQUIREMENTS:

- Bachelor’s degree; preferably in business or technology-related field

- Solid years of professional experience in IT and/or related business experience

- Extensive experience in configuring Salesforce and other CRMs using workflows, validation rules, roles & profiles, reports, and dashboards with demonstrated advanced proficiency

- Proven ability to develop a clear understanding of internal clients’ needs and the capability to incorporate them into processes and solutions

- A good facilitator with a strong personality and relationship management ability to communicate, influence and collaborate with multiple stakeholders



DETAILS TO CONSIDER BEFORE SENDING YOUR APPLICATION:

- REQUIRED WORKINGS HOURS: US business hours (PH night shift)

- Status: Full-time (~40 hrs per week); 8 hours per day excluding breaks

- Candidate must be open to using a time tracking app while working

- Weekend offs

- Location: Virtual team (work from home)



BENEFITS:

- 11 Paid regional/religious holidays per year

- 12 PTO days per year (accrued incrementally with pay periods)

- Healthcare reimbursement for a tea
mber

- 13th-month bonus (prorated by service length)

- Monthly internet reimbursement

- Quarterly performance bonus

title: Operations Manager
description:
We're looking for an Operations Manager for our growing DTC brand. You will own the supplier relationship, 3PL coordination, inventory management, freight, QC with manufacturer, and all external operational relationships. You think like a business owner, use technology and AI to work smarter, and are always three steps ahead of the next problem.



What you'll do:

You own the full operational layer of the business end to end. You are the single point of contact

for our supplier, warehouse, freight, and compliance. You think six months ahead, flag problems

before they happen, and always find smarter ways to get things done.



- Own the complete supplier relationship — all communications, payment tracking, production timelines, and capacity planning well ahead of demand

- Track defect rates across every batch, work with the customer service team to identify recurring issues, and report findings back to the supplier to continuously tighten their QC process.

- Manage inventory end to end — build the tracking system, make reorder recommendations with buffer planning, use data and demand signals to plan ahead even with limited history, and always find smarter ways to order and hold stock efficiently

- Own all pre-order management — ensure dates are always accurate and every channel is aligned before anything goes live

- Own the 3PL and freight relationships completely — audit every invoice, monitor fulfillment standards, coordinate large incoming batches in advance, and always looking for ways to improve efficiency

- Coordinate packaging updates with designers — minor changes through the internal team, major changes through our freelance packaging designer

- When new SKUs or accessories are introduced, own the full operational setup end to end — production, certifications, manuals, and packaging all aligned before launch

- Track all compliance certifications proactively — know what is current, what is expiring, and chase anything outstanding before it becomes a problem

- Keep all documentation and legal items organised and up to date — nothing slips through the cracks

- Build SOPs for every repeatable process so the operation is scalable and any future hire can onboard without asking a single question

- Work alongside the CS team to feed recurring product issues back into the supplier relationship and QC process



What we're looking for:

- 5 or more years in ecommerce operations, supply chain, or logistics — the more the better

- Strong end to end supply chain knowledge from overseas supplier through to customer delivery

- Experience managing overseas manufacturers — China experience a strong plus

- Proven experience working with 3PLs and freight forwarders

- Analytical mindset — comfortable reading data, spotting patterns, and forecasting demand even with limited history

- Proven ability to build SOPs and documentation systems from scratch

- Startup or high-growth environment experience — comfortable when nothing is defined



Please send your CV if you met the qualifications

title: Real Estate Financial Modeling & Development Analyst
description:
About Eluvial Academy

Eluvial Academy develops professional-grade educational tools and templates for real estate investors, developers, and traders. Our materials are used in real-world deal analysis, capital preparation, and development execution. We focus on bridging institutional standards with beginner accessibility.

 

Role Overview

Eluvial Academy is seeking a Real Estate Financial Modeling & Development Analyst (Contract) to design and build a comprehensive suite of real estate and crypto education templates. This is a hands-on, execution-focused role for someone with a strong background in real estate finance, development underwriting, and financial modeling.

The ideal candidate has direct experience underwriting deals, structuring capital, and building financial models from scratch—not just reviewing them.

 

Key Responsibilities

Financial Modeling & Underwriting

• Build a Residential Pro Forma Template + User Guide for 1–4 unit, ADU, and small multifamily deals

• Develop a Commercial Pro Forma Template for multifamily, mixed-use, and development projects

• Create a LIHTC / Affordable Housing Analysis Guide to support subsidized and public-private projects

 

Investor & Capital Materials

• Design a professional Investor Pitch Deck Template (.pptx)

• Create a One-Page Deal Summary Template (.docx)

• Develop an Executive Summary Template

• Prepare a Lender / Investor Summary Sheet

• Draft a Joint Venture (JV) Term Sheet Template

• Create a Letter of Intent (LOI) Template

 

Acquisition & Due Diligence Tools

• Develop a Comprehensive Due Diligence Checklist

• Build Expanded Due Diligence Worksheets (zoning, utilities, environmental, legal, financial risks)

• Create a Property Inspection Checklist

 

Development & Construction Tools

• Build a Rehab & Construction Budget Template (hard costs, soft costs, contingencies, draw alignment)

• Create a Gantt Chart Project Schedule Template

• Develop a Commercial Rent Roll Template

• Build a Rent Comps & Market Analysis Worksheet

 

Crypto Education Tool

• Design a Crypto Trade Tracker & Trading Journal Template

• Include trade logging, P&L tracking, risk/reward analysis, and behavioral journaling

• Ensure clear educational disclaimers (non-advisory)

 

Quality Assurance & Delivery

• Ensure all templates are functional, reusable, and clearly documented

• Align templates with Eluvial Academy’s Stan Store bundles:

o Starter Investor Bundle

o Investor-Ready Bundle

o Developer Toolkit

o Crypto Trader Toolkit

• Participate in biweekly progress reviews

 

Required Qualifications

• Strong background in real estate finance, development, or investment analysis

• Proven experience building financial models and pro formas from scratch

• Solid understanding of:

o Residential and commercial underwriting

o Debt sizing, returns, and capital stacks

o Investor and lender expectations

description:

You will know this brand well enough to carry its voice without being told how.

— A natural feel for lifestyle, home, or faith-rooted brands

Our homes are a reflection of what we believe.

We build with people who believe it too.

title: Hooks & Engagement Specialist (Podcast + YouTube, SEO + Copywriting)
description:
Hooks & Engagement Specialist (Podcast + YouTube, SEO + Copywriting)



We’re looking for a sharp, detail-oriented hooks and engagement specialist to review and refine podcast show notes, episode titles, YouTube titles, and social media copy.



This role is for someone who understands what hooks people in and what keeps them engaged. You know how to spot weak phrasing, flat titles, and forgettable copy, and turn them into something stronger, sharper, and more compelling.



We want someone who understands SEO, but also knows what makes good copywriting. You should know how to turn a decent title into one that feels clear, compelling, engaging, and worth clicking. You understand the difference between flat wording and language that pulls people in. You know how to create curiosity without sounding gimmicky, and how to write in a way that makes people want to keep reading.



This is not a “just use AI” role. We are not looking for someone who simply rewrites content with ChatGPT and sends it back. We want someone who uses their brain, has strong judgment, and understands what makes people click, read, and pay attention.



What You’ll Be Doing:

• Review and improve podcast episode titles for clarity, curiosity, SEO value, and click-through potential

• Review and improve YouTube titles with a strong understanding of what drives clicks without sounding forced or generic

• Edit show notes for readability, structure, flow, engagement, and SEO optimization

• Refine social media copy so it is more engaging, polished, and aligned with the episode

• Strengthen weak phrasing and make content more compelling while staying true to the brand voice

• Identify where content loses 
ntum and improve the hook, phrasing, and overall pull



What We’re Looking For:

• Strong instincts for writing titles and headlines that make people want to click

• A real understanding of good copywriting, not just grammar or basic editing

• Solid SEO knowledge, especially around keyword placement, search intent, and title structure

• A strong feel for hooks, audience psychology, and what keeps people interested

• Experience editing content for podcasts, YouTube, or other digital media

• Someone who can think critically and make smart editorial decisions, not just rely on AI output

• Strong attention to detail and a high standard for quality



>>> If you have a habit of disappearing, missing deadlines, or going silent without communication, please do not apply.

The better you can connect with the people you are speaking to, the more leads you will get.  

We use mojo dialer and a CRM software that you will be trained on.  We will give bonuses if you are successfully bringing in leads.

title: Government Contract Bid Coordinator / Proposal Specialist
description:
We are a U.S.-based facility management and general contracting company looking for a sharp, detail-oriented Government Contract Bid Coordinator / Proposal Specialist to help us identify, qualify, prepare, and track government bid opportunities.



This is not a generic VA role. We are looking for someone who understands how to work through solicitations carefully, organize compliance requirements, coordinate documents, and help produce complete, on-time submissions.



What you will do



Search for relevant federal, state, and local government bid opportunities

Review solicitations and summarize scope, deadlines, required documents, and key risks

Build compliance checklists and bid/no-bid summaries

Organize company information needed for submissions, including certifications, forms, resumes, past performance, and supporting documents

Draft first-pass proposal content, forms, capability responses, and submission packages

Coordinate internally to gather pricing, scope, technical information, and attachments

Maintain a live tracker of opportunities, deadlines, submissions, outcomes, and reasons for loss

Help improve our process over time so we pursue better opportunities and submit stronger packages



What we need



Prior experience supporting government bids, proposals, or contract submissions

Strong written English

Very strong attention to detail

Ability to read long documents and extract exactly what is required

Strong organization skills in Excel / Google Sheets / document management

Ability to work independently and communicate clearly

Experience with 
, federal/state/local solicitations, compliance checklists, or proposal coordination is strongly preferred



Important

We are not looking for someone who only searches for bids and sends links.

We are looking for someone who can help manage the process from opportunity review through compliant submission.



To apply

Please answer the following:



What exact experience do you have with government bids, RFPs, RFQs, IFBs, or Sources Sought?

What parts of the process have you personally handled yourself?

Send one example of a solicitation or proposal package you worked on and explain your role.

In one paragraph, explain the difference between finding opportunities and qualifying opportunities.

In one paragraph, explain how you would review a solicitation to make sure nothing is missed.

Put the words Blue Folder at the top of your application so I know you read this fully.



Compensation

Part-time to start, with room to grow into a long-term role based on performance.

Please include your monthly salary expectation and your availability.

title: Certified QuickBooks Expert. Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist
description:
Job Title:

Certified QuickBooks Expert: Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper. 

This Position is ONLY for candidates who are Certified QB  Accountant or Bookkeeper. (Please ensure you attach verification of your certification). 



Location:

Remote (Work From Home)



Job Type:

Part-Time 



About EZ TelePsych:

EZ TelePsych is a dynamic and rapidly growing healthcare company committed to excellence in mental health services. We pride ourselves on providing top-quality care and maintaining efficient, accurate financial operations. We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented Certified QuickBooks Expert Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist to join our team part-time. This role requires expertise in U.S. accounting, payroll processing, and tax regulations.



Position Overview:

As our virtual accountant/bookkeeper & payroll specialist, you will be responsible for managing and maintaining accurate financial records, overseeing payroll processing, reconciling accounts, ensuring compliance with U.S. tax laws, and providing financial reports. This is a remote, part-time position with flexible hours, but availability during Monday–Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM EST (U.S. hours) is required.



Key Responsibilities:

Manage daily financial transactions and records using QuickBooks Online.

Categorize, reconcile, and maintain accurate bookkeeping records.

Prepare monthly financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow).

Reconcile bank and credit card statements, investigate discrepancies.

Oversee and process accurate payroll for employees and contractors.

Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local payroll tax regulations.

Handle payroll tax filings and reporting.

Provide tax planning strategies and advice on potential tax savings.

Prepare and file federal, state, and local tax returns (business taxes).

Stay updated on U.S. tax laws and financial regulations.

Provide audit support and respond to any tax authority inquiries.

Communicate financial status, tax deadlines, and payroll updates regularly to the leadership team.



Qualifications:

CPA, EA, or Master's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field preferred.

3–5+ years of experience in U.S.-based bookkeeping, accounting, tax preparation, and payroll processing.

Expert proficiency in QuickBooks Online.

Strong knowledge of U.S. tax laws, payroll compliance, and financial reporting.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word) and financial tools. google suite

Excellent attention to detail, organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication skills (written and verbal).

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

title: Client Success Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

The Lead Client Success Specialist ensures clients move smoothly through onboarding, stay on track with required tasks, understand each step of their bookkeeping/tax process, and feel guided throughout their engagement with the firm.

This role supplements the Project Manager by handling all client-facing communication, client education, gentle task chasing, deadline preparation, and coordination of calls and bookings with the Lead Financial Consultant. You are the “client guide” — keeping them accountable, informed, and supported so the CEO and PM can focus on strategic work and internal operations.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES



Client Onboarding

- Guide new clients through all onboarding steps using templates/scripts.

- Explain required documents and next steps clearly and simply.

- Track client readiness and update the Project Manager.

- Ensure all documents, signatures, and tasks are submitted on time.



Client Management & Task Follow-Up

- Proactively follow up on missing documents, overdue tasks, or unanswered messages.

- Maintain a clean client status log and escalate delays to the PM.

- Clarify expectations and deadlines to keep clients moving forward.



Communication

- Respond to client questions in Slack and TaxDome using approved materials.

- Provide updates on deadlines, deliverables, and next steps.

- Flag only complex issues to the PM or CEO.



Scheduling

- Schedule onboarding calls, data collection calls, and consultation calls.

- Send reminders and prepare clients for each call (what to bring, what to expect).

- Coordinate reschedules and maintain clean calendars.



Support the PM & CEO

- Notify PM when clients complete onboarding tasks.

- Update project stages, client portals, and Google Drive folders.

- Reduce interruptions by handling 80–90% of client-facing admin.



Success Metrics

- Onboarding completed within target timelines

- Reduction in CEO involvement in client follow-ups

- On-time client document submissions

- Fast response time to client inquiries

- Lower workflow delays caused by missing information



REQUIREMENTS

- Strong written and verbal English

- Excellent customer service and communication skills

- Project management & coordination experience

- Highly organized and detail-oriented

- Comfortable with Slack, Google Workspace, TaxDome (training provided)

- Prior VA experience in a service, agency, accounting, or legal firm is a plus



HOURS

- Full-time (35–40 hrs/week)

title: Photorealistic Rendering Contractor for Interior Design
description:
We are an interior design firm that would like to find a contractor who is highly skilled in using AI software to develop photorealistic renderings of interior spaces. The goal would be for us to provide a photograph of a room along with a description of the design elements to be incorporated, and have the contractor produce a realistic visual rendering of the space.



The design elements we would provide would typically include materials, furniture selections, lighting, and the intended space plan layout.

title: CSR Manager
description:
Job Description: Customer Service Manager

Position Overview

The Customer Service Director is responsible for overseeing the customer service department and ensuring that customers receive outstanding support and service. This role involves managing a team of customer service representatives, developing and implementing policies and procedures, and working to improve overall customer satisfaction.

Key Responsibilities

?Team Management: Supervise and mentor customer service staff, including hiring, training, and performance evaluation.

?Customer Support: Ensure the delivery of high-quality customer service across all channels, including phone,
, live chat, and social media.

?Policy Development: Develop and implement customer service policies and procedures to enhance the customer experience.

?Issue Resolution: Address and resolve escalated customer issues and complaints promptly and effectively.

?Performance Monitoring: Monitor and analyze key performance indicators (KPIs) to assess the efficiency and effectiveness of the customer service team.

?Continuous Improvement: Identify areas for improvement in customer service processes and implement appropriate solutions.

?Training Programs: Develop and conduct training programs to keep the customer service team updated on best practices and company policies.

?Technology Utilization: Utilize customer service software and tools to manage and track customer interactions and improve service delivery.

?Feedback Collection: Gather and analyze customer feedback to identify trends and areas for improvement.

?Collaboration: Work closely with other departments, such as sales, marketing, and product development, to ensure a seamless customer experience.

?Budget Management: Manage the customer service department budget and ensure cost-effective operations.

Required Skills and Qualifications

?Experience: At least 10 years proven experience as a customer service director or in a similar role.

?Leadership: Strong leadership and team management skills.

?Communication: Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

?Problem-Solving: Strong problem-solving and conflict resolution skills.

?Customer Focus: Deep understanding of customer service principles and practices.

?Analytical Skills: Ability to analyze performance metrics and identify areas for improvement.

?Technical Proficiency: Familiarity with customer service software, databases, and tools.

?Organizational Skills: Excellent organizational and multitasking abilities.

?Interpersonal Skills: Ability to build strong relationships with customers and tea
mbers.

?Education: Bachelor’s degree in business administration, marketing, or a related field is preferred.



Job Type:

Full-time- this is a full-time position that needs to be engaged during the entire shift. You will not have the ability to use this as a 2nd job.



Shift:

Monday- Friday CST 7am to 5pm 10 Hours Per Day- 1 Hour Break*

*Please note this is 9pm to 7am Philippines time half the year and half the year it would be 8pm to 6am.



Salary:

50,000 PHP to 100,000 PHP. Salary is done 2x a month on the 21st and the 6th day of the month.



You will have paid time off for the holidays we are closed in the U.S.



Company Introduction:



Welcome to Tri-State Tree Service, a beacon of excellence in the tree service industry for over 30 years. Based in the picturesque heart of Pensacola, FL, we've been nurturing roots of trust and quality in the communities we serve. As a TCIA (Tree Care Industry Association) accredited company, we're part of an elite group; less than 1% of Tree Service Companies attain this prestigious certification, setting us apart in our commitment to industry-leading standards and practices.



Our legacy is enriched by our unwavering dedication to technological innovation. With significant investments in the latest equipment and cutting-edge techniques, we've positioned ourselves as pioneers, consistently delivering unparalleled services to our valued clientele. At Tri-State Tree Service, you're not just finding a job – you're becoming part of a tradition rooted in excellence, innovation, and community growth. Embark on a journey with us and elevate your career as we continue to reach new heights in the tree care sector.



Application Process:

To apply, please ensure you do the following:

1. Include “Customer Tree” in the
 subject line.

2. Attach your most recent resume.

3. Include a link to a brief video (3 minutes or less) explaining why you are the ideal candidate for this position.



Failure to follow these instructions will result in your application not being considered. Ensure that you have a computer, noise-cancelling headset, and a reliable internet connection for this role.



Join us in delivering excellent results-business processes marketing and driving our team towards achieving remarkable success. We look forward to welcoming you aboard!

title: Tax Planning Admin
description:
Role Overview

If you enjoy being the person who keeps everything organized, on track, and running smoothly—and want to play a critical role in delivering a high-end client experience—this role is for you.



DiLucci CPA Firm has been serving business owners and real estate investors since 2005. For nearly two decades, we’ve built a reputation for doing tax differently—by going deeper than compliance, telling clients the truth, and using the tax code strategically to protect and grow their wealth. Our mission is simple: help clients keep more of what they earn while giving them clarity, confidence, and a long-term plan. We hold ourselves to a high bar: Genuine Care, Great Communication, Speed to Learning, and Fun Tax Energy.



As a Tax Planning Admin, you will serve as the operational backbone of the tax planning team—owning scheduling, client communication, document collection, and workflow tracking. You are the person ensuring nothing falls through the cracks, clients feel supported, and the team operates at a high level.



This is a fast-paced, high-ownership role ideal for someone who is proactive, detail-oriented, and thrives in keeping multiple moving pieces aligned.



Key Responsibilities



Scheduling & Client Coordination

- Manage and coordinate client scheduling across the tax planning team

- Ensure calendars are optimized, appointments are confirmed, and meetings are fully prepared

- Serve as a point of contact for clients to ensure a smooth, professional experience



Document Collection & Follow-Ups

- Proactively request, track, and follow up on missing client documents

- Ensure all required information is received ahead of planning deadlines

- Maintain accountability with clients while delivering a high-touch experience



File Organization & Documentation

- Organize and maintain clean, structured client files within internal systems

- Ensure all documents are properly labeled, uploaded, and accessible

- Keep client information centralized and easy for the team to navigate



Discovery Notes & Preparation

- Create clear, organized discovery notes from client data and internal inputs

- Prepare summaries ahead of planning calls so advisors are fully equipped

- Ensure accuracy and completeness of all pre-call materials



Workflow Tracking & Execution

- Track the status of all active clients and ensure work is progressing on time

- Identify bottlenecks and take action to keep projects moving forward

- Coordinate across tea
mbers during high-volume periods



Client Communication & Support

- Manage ongoing client communication through
 and internal systems

- Respond promptly and professionally to client inquiries

- Ensure all client touchpoints are handled with care and no communication goes unanswered



Role Expectations

- Maintain strong organization across multiple clients, deadlines, and workflows

- Ensure timely follow-ups and consistent client communication

- Operate proactively by identifying issues before they become problems

- Keep internal systems clean, accurate, and up to date

- Be a reliable, steady presence that the team can depend on

- To qualify, write "Tax" in the Middle of your Subject Line and at the end of your message.



Requirements

- Strong organizational and time management skills

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and priorities simultaneously

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills (high English proficiency)

- High attention to detail and strong follow-through

- Ability to work in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment

- Comfortable using digital tools and systems for tracking and communication



Benefits & Perks

- Work from home (remote role)

- Exposure to high-level tax planning workflows and operations

- Opportunity to grow within a fast-scaling, high-performance team



DiLucci CPA Core Values

- Genuine Care – Trusted advisor relationships, not transactional work

- Great Communication – Clear, proactive, and timely

- Speed to Learning & Implementation – Adapt quickly as laws and strategies evolve

- Fun Tax Energy (FTE) – We take pride in excellent tax work

title: QuickBook Expert - Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper, Tax Planner, Tax Filer, and Payroll Specialist
description:

QuickBooks Expert Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist



Location:

Remote (Work From Home)

Part-Time



About EZ TelePsych:

EZ TelePsych is a dynamic and rapidly growing healthcare company committed to excellence in mental health services. We pride ourselves on providing top-quality care and maintaining efficient, accurate financial operations. We are seeking a highly skilled and detail-oriented QuickBooks Expert Virtual Accountant/Bookkeeper & Payroll Specialist to join our team part-time. As our virtual accountant/bookkeeper & payroll specialist, you will be responsible for managing and maintaining accurate financial records, overseeing payroll processing, reconciling accounts, ensuring compliance with U.S. tax laws, and providing financial reports. This is a remote, part-time position with flexible hours, but availability during Monday–Friday, 8 AM – 5 PM EST (U.S. hours) is required.

Manage daily financial transactions and records using QuickBooks Online.

Categorize, reconcile, and maintain accurate bookkeeping records.

Oversee and process accurate payroll for employees and contractors.

Ensure compliance with federal, state, and local payroll tax regulations.

Handle payroll tax filings and reporting.

Provide tax planning strategies and advice on potential tax savings.

Prepare and file federal, state, and local tax returns (business taxes).

Stay updated on U.S. tax laws and financial regulations.

Provide audit support and respond to any tax authority inquiries.

Communicate financial status, tax deadlines, and payroll updates regularly to the leadership team.

Qualifications:

CPA, EA, or Master's degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field preferred.

3–5+ years of experience in U.S.-based bookkeeping, accounting, tax preparation, and payroll processing.

Expert proficiency in QuickBooks Online.

Strong knowledge of U.S. tax laws, payroll compliance, and financial reporting.

Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, Word) and financial tools.

Excellent attention to detail, organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

Strong communication skills (written and verbal).

Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

Reliable high-speed internet connection and a dedicated home office setup.

What We Offer:

Competitive pay rate: PHP 20,000 – 30,000/month (based on experience).

Performance bonuses: Paid twice yearly after completing the first year.

Flexible working hours with core availability required during U.S. business hours (Mon–Fri, 8 AM – 5 PM EST) and occasional weekend availability as needed.

Opportunity to work with a supportive, professional, and dynamic team.

Continuous training, learning opportunities, and professional growth.

Submit an video recording about your experience and
 Submit your resume and cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and skills via this job post or
 
 with the subject line:

We’re seeking a highly experienced, detail-oriented Grant Writer to support our mission-driven work through research, writing, and submission of grant proposals. This is an ideal role for someone who loves the craft of grant writing — identifying aligned funders, crafting compelling narratives, and adhering meticulously to guidelines.

You take pride in clean, professional writing and translating impact into fundable proposals. All work must be 100% human-written; AI tools (ChatGPT, Jasper, Claude, etc.) are strictly prohibited for the written work.

This role is best suited for someone who values long-term collaboration, steady weekly work, and contributing to meaningful initiatives, rather than chasing high hourly rates.



Key Responsibilities

Research and identify grant opportunities aligned with our mission and eligibility requirements

Review grant guidelines and summarize key submission requirements

Draft sections of proposals using templates and internal notes

Edit and proofread narratives for clarity, impact, and compliance

Assist with application assembly and submission checklists

Track deadlines, submissions, and outcomes



Required Skills & Experience

Advanced written English: impeccable grammar, clarity, professional tone

Strong research skills and exceptional attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions and templates precisely

Reliable communication and strong deadline management

Proficiency with Google Docs, spreadsheets, and online portals

Prior grant writing or nonprofit experience

Background in research, writing, or administrative support

Familiarity with U.S.-based nonprofits or foundations



Hours & Compensation

15 hours/week, flexible schedule as long as deadlines and submissions are met

Pay: $4/$5 USD/hour, depending on experience

Performance-based bonuses: Fixed “Win Bonus” awarded when a grant is awarded (not tied to award size and never commission-based)



Additional Benefits

Wage increases with tenure, integrity, and professional development

Holiday bonuses (after 3+ months with the company)

Virtual annual holiday party & wellness gathering (pending company growth)

Flexible scheduling within weekly hours

Birthday massage gift (after 6+ months)

100% remote work – no commuting

Creative and collaborative environment with opportunities to innovate



How to Apply

Please submit via platform only (do not
). Include:

Resume

Cover letter highlighting relevant experience and interest in Manifesting Serenity

Portfolio showcasing successful grants and outcomes (100% human-written)

Checklist of what I will need to have ready and available to support grant applications

Important: Use the subject line “Grant Awarded” in your application. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



This is a unique opportunity for a detail-driven grant writer to make a measurable impact at a mission-driven brand blending travel, wellness, and sustainability.

Best Wishes,

Serenity Lesley

title: Personal Coach and Operations Assistant
description:
PERSONAL COACH AND OPERATIONS ASSISTANT — ISAAC OCEAN

10 hrs/week · $200/month to start · Part-time with full-time path · Remote



Start part time, building to full time for the right person.



I am a business owner, musician, and entrepreneur running multiple ventures simultaneously. I need one person who shows up for me every single weekday — someone warm, organized, and genuinely invested in my growth. Not a task manager. A real personal coach who also keeps the logistics running.



This starts at 10 hours a week. For the right person it becomes a full-time role, a management position, and a long-term relationship.



WHAT THIS ROLE ACTUALLY IS

Your primary job is to keep me focused, accountable, and moving toward my goals every single day. You will learn my life, my businesses, my schedule, and my patterns. You will track my numbers, notice when I'm drifting, and bring me back — with warmth and precision, not pressure.



THE AREAS OF MY LIFE YOU WILL HELP ME MANAGE

- Paid To Paint LLC — the fastest growing residential painting company in South Florida

- Personal health and fitness — daily habits, consistency, physical goals

- Music and creative projects — Isaac Ocean and the Waves, songwriting, performance

- Additional ventures — Kava Bar concept, musical theater, lifestyle brand

- Weekly and monthly goal tracking across all areas — numbers, streaks, wins, misses



YOUR DAILY STRUCTURE

Morning (7:00–8:00 AM ET)(This can be 6-7:00am for the right person): Daily check-in. Living coaching questions. Priorities locked. Numbers reviewed. Day set up for success.

Evening (4:00–8:00 PM ET, 1 hour): Day recap. What got done and what didn't. Full plan built for tomorrow. To be clear, this is also 1 hour, but I have flexibility at the end of the day, that one hour can be in that range.



WHAT YOU TRACK AND MANAGE

- Daily and weekly goal progress — living tracker we build together

- Google Calendar — owned and managed by you

- Habit streaks, fitness check-ins, and creative project milestones

- Business KPIs — doors knocked, leads, jobs booked, revenue

- Weekly recap report — wins, misses, patterns, next week's priorities

- Accountability bonus tracking — shared monthly goals



WHAT YOU GROW INTO

- Coaching and managing field staff using systems we build together

- Running operations, onboarding, and training for the whole team

- Learning
 Ads, Go High Level CRM, video editing, SEO, content strategy — all trained by us

- Full-time operations and coaching manager

- Equity path for the right person after year 1

- You must train your replacement before you move up



COMPENSATION STRUCTURE

Start (10 hrs/week): $200/month

Quarterly raise: +$50 for each new responsibility mastered

Full-time cap (2 years): $800/month base

Monthly bonus: +$100 when we hit shared accountability goals

Quarterly and annual performance bonuses

13th month pay every December

Equity path after year 1 for the right person



WHAT MAKES THE RIGHT PERSON

- Warm, encouraging, genuinely invested in the person you support

- Data-driven — you love tracking numbers, spotting patterns, measuring progress

- Proactive — you notice things before being asked and bring solutions

- Coaching mindset — you know when to push and when to listen

- Consistent — same energy every day, no drama

- Has your own goals you are actively working toward

- Believes helping someone else win is a meaningful way to spend your time



INTERVIEW AND HIRING PROCESS

Step 1 — Voice recording application (required)

Send your voice recording and resume directly to: 

Step 2 — Minimum 30-minute video interview for all finalists

Step 3 — Paid test: 4 finalists, 3 hours over video — 1 hour live coaching and onboarding, 2 hours real work. Paid for your time.



HARD REQUIREMENTS

- Available 7:00–8:00 AM or 6:00 -7:00 am or 5:00 - 6:00 AM ET and 1 hour between 4:00–8:00 PM ET, Monday–Friday

- On video every morning — not optional

- Reliable fast internet — non-negotiable

- Fluent English, clear and natural, no heavy accent

- Spanish fluency is a massive bonus

- Warm, positive, emotionally intelligent — coaching is your nature

- Comfortable tracking data alongside the human side of accountability

- Looking for a long-term relationship, not a contract gig



OUR CULTURE

We celebrate wins. We talk about goals — yours and mine. We treat each other like adults who are genuinely invested in each other's growth. You will not be yelled at, ever. We hold each other accountable, and that is sacred here.



TO APPLY

Send a 60–90 second voice recording to 
 me one personal goal you are actively working on right now, how you track your own progress, and what makes you a coach — not just an assistant. Include your resume and confirm your available hours in Eastern Time. Before applying, please complete this free DISC personality assessment (takes 10 minutes)
/disc-personality-test Screenshot your results and include them with your voice recording and resume. 



No voice recording means no review. No Screenshot of DISC personality no review. No exceptions.

title: Full Time Social Media Manager (LinkedIn/Instagram)
description:
Full-time social media manager role. Potential to grow into a team leader if we work well together.



THE JOB

Social Media Manager for John J D Munn, a successful business coach who helps professional service business owners to grow in his unique happiness-first system. His website: 
 

You will work directly with John and will be in charge of creating and posting content to LinkedIn and Instagram to drive discoverability and generate leads.

Fluent English, with C1?level written English.

Your own laptop/desktop &?stable 50?Mbps+ minimum internet.

Use and knowledge of LinkedIn and Instagram.

Use and knowledge of Google Suite.

You are reliable, creative, and data driven.



BENEFITS

Flexible; work any hours and any days you like from wherever you want.

1:1 personal coaching with John to help you develop your skills.

Training stipend (minimum $100 per year + more available for courses we agree on).

Performance bonuses (for leads generated).



TOOLS YOU WILL USE

LinkedIn

Instagram

Google suite (including Google Docs, Sheets, Calendar, etc)

Zoho mail

Fireflies AI notetaker 

ChatGPT or other AI

Canva



TASKS

Social Media Posts – Create LinkedIn and Instagram posts based on client testimonials and supplied content angles to boost engagement and generate leads. Will involve occasional image creation using Canva and possibly some video editing. 

Content Calendar – Build and maintain a content calendar to ensure consistent publishing.

Reporting – Weekly report on content performance.

Some Video Editing – Produce video montages or clips from supplied client videos.

DMs and messaging clients using scripts.

Discretionary tasks such as updating lead records or other tasks John deems necessary.

A 30-minute call together at least once every 2 weeks (but with more in the beginning).

Send me weekly report on how your time has been spent 



Your social media responsibilities will be organic only for the time being, you will not be responsible for paid engagements like running ads.



HOW TO APPLY

Please provide a link to your portfolio/social posts and results you have achieved in similar roles. 

Please also record a 2 minute introduction video of yourself describing your experience and why you think you are a good fit for this role. Send it to me as a message here on onlinejobs. Please show something with the date in your video (e.g. hold up a piece of paper with the date written on it at the start of the video).  Only applications including a video will be considered.



Application video deadline?0900 UK time on 29th?April. 

Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by 1700 UK time on ?30th ?April for a paid trial task. 

Role starts 4th May.



Once hired we will start with a paid 4?week trial at 40 hours per week and a 90?day probation period with formal review.

title: Website Manager
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring for an E-commerce Store and Website Manager

Location: Remote

Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses



About the Company

Ikigai Cases (
) is a family-owned e-commerce business selling premiu
tal pill cases. Founded in December 2021, the business has been operated by two brothers from Washington, DC since then. After four years, the company has grown to selling thousands of pill cases every month and double-digit tea
mbers, including a thriving remote team.



Our mission is simple: to make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We uphold this commitment by managing our fulfillment operations in-house and offering white-glove service to our customers.



We are looking to hire an E-commerce Store and Website Manager to join our growing remote team.



About You

-You should be self-motivated and looking to work hard - as you will be expected to work hard, contribute and execute without supervision to help the whole team.

-You are highly organized and detail-oriented, with the ability to juggle multiple priorities without sacrificing quality.

-You take pride in your work and are proactive, anticipating the needs of the company and ensuring smooth day-to-day operations.



Key Responsibilities

-Oversee the daily management and performance of our Website and Shopify store.

-Maintain and update product listings, inventory, pricing, and shipping settings.

-Setup all assets in Shopify for new item releases and promotional sale periods

-Make basic website edits using the Shopify theme editor (excluding coding) and escalate higher level coding tasks to the in-team developer. 

-Collaborate with and manage 3rd-party developers to implement technical changes or customizations.

-Set up and manage A/B testing experiments using Intelligems to optimize store performance.

-Ensure the site is fully functional, user-friendly, and aligned with business goals

-Monitor, analyze and report on store performance regarding customer experience, satisfaction, sales and other metrics.

-Create, maintain and submit store logs. 

-Troubleshoot and resolve website-related issues promptly.

-Maintain high standards of accuracy, efficiency, and consistency across the site.



Required Experience & Skills Experience

-3+ years of experience in e-commerce working for a brand directly and/or digital marketing agencies working on an e-commerce brand’s account. 

-Strong familiarity with Shopify store operations and admin tools.

-Hands-on experience managing website content and basic theme customization (excluding coding)

-Proven ability to manage external Shopify Developers

-Self-starter with strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.

-Comfortable working independently and owning outcomes.

-Must be based outside the United States.



Preferred Experiences

-Experience running A/B tests using platforms such as Intelligems.

-Experience using page builders (Replo preferred) in addition to Shopify Theme Editor

-Proven experience in merchandise planning, pricing strategies, and inventory management for an online store.



Communication & English Proficiency 

-Strong written and verbal English skills.

-Ability to communicate effectively with internal teams and external partners via
.

-Ability to receive and provide constructive feedback.



Compensation Details

-Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses

-Work Hours: 45 hours per week, Monday to Friday Business Hours, EST

-Paid Holidays: 10 paid holidays per year

-PTO: 1 week earned for every 6 months worked at the company



To Apply

Fill out the application form here: 



This application includes a number of questions in order to ensure we hire an outstanding candidate for this position, so please be advised in advance that it will take time to complete.



Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis. Qualified candidates will be contacted for interviews. Applications on OnlineJobs.ph, DMs, and messages sent via
 will not be reviewed.

title: Video Editing and Content Strategy VA
description:
I am looking for a Content Creation and Strategy VA in the home decor, DIY, and online business niche who is Smart, Fast, and Works Hard! I need someone who is technologically savvy with knowledge in video creation across platforms, graphic design, photo editing skills, and has great organization and project management capabilities! This is not just an editing role. I am looking for someone who understands content, stays on top of trends, and can contribute creatively to make videos more engaging and high-performing.



As part of this role, my VA should be able to execute a variety of video creation and strategy tasks, such as, but not limited to:



- Research in my niche, coming up with video ideas, video planning, content calendar, scheduling, and project management

- Take my raw videos and create videos that convey my brand into accurate and compelling visual communication.

- Create videos that will complement the rest of our content - blogs, articles, and webpages for effective marketing on social media.

- Building our content strategy. I don’t have much time to conceptualize creative and relevant content ideas.

- Create and publish video versions across platforms such as my website, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, campaigns, digital courses, training content, webinars, ads, and other relevant areas

- Help with producing and publishing regular videos

- Help in producing enough content for my social media channels



**What You’ll Be Doing**



- Edit short-form videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) and long-form videos (YouTube), including adding captions, transitions, music, and effects to enhance engagement

- Repurpose long-form content into multiple short-form clips

- Design simple graphics using Canva (thumbnails, overlays, etc.)

- Perform basic photo editing for blog and social media content

- Stay updated with content trends, hooks, and editing styles, and suggest improvements to make content more engaging and aligned with audience behavior

- Support content strategy across three brands:

    - DIY & Home Decor

    - Digital Products / Business

    - Personal brand

- Organize and manage files, edits, and deadlines, communicate regularly and provide updates on tasks



To get an idea of what I do, check out my:

Instagram accounts - 


/createanddwell


/itsdivyaprabhakar

Blog - 



Here are the skills I am looking for in my VA:



1. Video Editing Skills: Should have strong Video editing skills and be knowledgeable about content creation in the home decor niche and editing talking head videos

2. Graphic Design and Multimedia: Should be able to come up with graphic design using Canva or any other graphic design software as needed for the video content

3. Photo Editing: Should have basic photo editing skills to be able to edit images that accompany the video content

4. Technical Expertise: ****Strong understanding of video editing software/apps such as Adobe Premiere, Final Cut Pro, Edits, Capcut or others, content management systems, social media platforms and other digital tools used in video creation and editing. 

5. Creative Thinking: ****Should be able to come up with original ideas or angles when editing or designing content that will move the target audience. Have an eye for aesthetic design since visual presentation is increasingly critical in my niche.

6. Great Communication Skills: ****Should be able to ****communicate effectively and clearly in order to ensure smooth execution of tasks. Must be open to feedback and adapt to changing needs

7. Organization and Time Management: Video creation requires meticulous attention to detail and deadlines, so staying organized and responsible is critical for success. 

8. Project Management: ****Should be able to utilize an online project management tool for collaboration and status updates 



**Work Setup**

- Remote

2. Your
 address

title: Senior Meta Media Buyer — Real Estate / Cash Home Buyer Niche
description:
US based marketing agency specializing in lead generation for local service businesses and real estate investors. We're hiring a dedicated Meta media buyer to take over one active client account (real estate cash-buyer business) with potential to scale to multiple accounts as we grow.



About the account:



Client is a real estate investor buying homes in Northwest Florida

Target audience: motivated sellers (inherited property, tired landlords, distressed situations, relocations)

Current challenge: lead quality — too many retail-minded sellers, not enough motivated ones

Need someone who understands motivated seller acquisition, NOT generic real estate lead gen



What you'll own:



Campaign strategy and structure rebuild

Audience research and testing (life events, behavioral targeting, geo-based signals)

Lead form optimization and qualifier logic

Weekly performance reporting with clear next tests

Monthly strategy review with agency owner



Requirements:



3+ years managing Meta ad accounts with minimum $5K/month spend

Proven experience in real estate, cash home buyer, motivated seller, or investor lead gen niches (STRONGLY preferred)

Comfortable with lead-gen funnels, not ecom or brand awareness

Excellent written English and communication

Familiarity with GoHighLevel is a plus



Rate: Open — bid your rate. We value quality over cheap.

Hours: ~10-15 hrs/week to start, more as we scale



How to apply:



Share 2-3 examples of Meta ad accounts you've managed (screenshots or case studies)

Tell me: what's the #1 mistake agencies make when running motivated seller campaigns?

Include the word "motivated" somewhere in your application so I know you read this post



Applicants who don't answer all 3 prompts will not be reviewed.

title: Acquisitions Manager — Real Estate
description:
Role Type

Acquisitions Manager — Real Estate



Title

Sales & Closings Specialist (Real Estate Investor)



Seniority

Mid–Senior Level (with fast-track to Lead Acquisitions / Sales Manager)



Mission of the Role

To convert motivated seller leads into signed contracts through confident, consultative sales conversations — helping homeowners solve problems while creating profitable deals for AceHOM Group.



Your job is to ensure every lead is:

- contacted quickly

- handled professionally

- properly qualified

- consistently followed up

- and converted into signed deals



You are the bridge between lead ? contract ? revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Inbound & Outbound Seller Calls

- Call inbound and outbound leads (warm + nurture leads)

- Build rapport quickly and establish trust with homeowners

- Control conversations while keeping a natural, human tone

- Identify motivation, timeline, condition, and price expectations



Sales & Closing

- Present offers confidently and handle objections in real-time

- Negotiate win-win solutions aligned with company margins

- Close deals over the phone or via virtual appointments

- Lock up contracts (cash offers, novations, creative deals when applicable)



Lead Qualification

- Accurately assess seller motivation and deal viability

- Gather all required property details (condition, repairs, situation)

- Identify decision-makers and eliminate unqualified leads early

- Properly categorize leads (hot, warm, nurture, dead)



Follow-Up Systems

- Consistent follow-up on all leads until they sell or opt out

- Use CRM (
 or similar) to manage pipeline

- Re-engage cold and aged leads with strategic outreach



Pipeline Management

- Keep CRM updated with notes, call outcomes, and next steps

- Move leads through pipeline stages correctly

- Ensure zero lead is left behind



Offer Strategy & Deal Structuring

- Work with dispo/leadership to determine offer ranges

- Understand ARV, repairs, and investor margins

- Present creative solutions when appropriate (novation, terms, etc.)



Collaboration with Dispositions / Operations

- Clearly communicate deal details to dispo team

- Ensure clean handoff from contract ? closing

- Assist in resolving issues that may arise before closing



Performance Tracking

- Track personal KPIs (calls, contacts, offers, contracts, revenue)

- Continuously improve conversion rates and sales performance



Client (Seller) Experience

- Deliver a professional, respectful, and problem-solving experience

- Represent AceHOM Group with integrity and excellence



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)



Closing Experience (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- Proven experience closing deals (real estate preferred)

- Strong objection handling and negotiation skills

- Comfortable asking for the sale and handling resistance



Communication (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- Excellent English (spoken + written)

- Clear, confident, and conversational tone

- Ability to build rapport quickly with diverse personalities



Sales Skillset

- Understands sales psychology and seller motivation

- Strong listening skills (not just talking)

- Can control conversations without sounding pushy



Real Estate Knowledge (Preferred but Trainable)

- Understanding of ARV, repairs, comps, and deal structure

- Familiar with wholesaling, novations, or creative finance (bonus)



CRM & Organization

- Experience using CRM systems (
, GHL, Podio, etc.)

- Strong note-taking and pipeline management



Professional Attributes

- Reliable and consistent (shows up every day ready to perform)

- Competitive and results-driven

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Strong work ethic

- Emotionally intelligent



Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

- Experience in real estate wholesaling or investing

- Experience closing over the phone (inside sales)

- Familiar with SMS/email follow-up systems

- Understanding of creative deal structures

- Experience working remote with a sales team



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Calls Made / Contacts Per Day

- Lead ? Offer Conversion Rate

- Offer ? Contract Conversion Rate

- Contracts Signed Per Week / Month

- Revenue Generated

- Follow-Up Consistency

- CRM Accuracy & Pipeline Management



Success Measures

- Leads are consistently converted into signed contracts

- Pipeline is clean, organized, and actively moving

- High follow-up discipline (no missed opportunities)

- Strong communication between acquisitions and dispo

- Increased deal volume and revenue for AceHOM Group

- Sellers have a positive, professional experience



Compensation

Base + Commission OR Commission-Heavy (based on experience)



Compensation is based on:

- Closing ability

- Consistency and reliability

- Deal volume and performance



High performers have uncapped earning potential.



Contract Type

- Full-Time preferred (Part-Time considered for proven closers)

- Must be available during U.S. business hours



Location

- Remote (U.S. preferred, international considered if English is excellent)

- Reliable internet and quiet work environment required



Growth Path

- Stage 1: Acquisitions Manager

- Stage 2: Senior Acquisitions (high closer / mentor)

title: Dispositions Manager — Real Estate
description:
Dispositions Manager — Real Estate (AceHOM Group)



Role Type

Dispositions Manager — Real Estate



Title

Buyer Relations & Sales Specialist (Investor Sales)



Seniority

Mid–Senior Level (with fast-track to Lead Dispositions / Sales Manager)



Mission of the Role

To maximize revenue and ensure fast, efficient deal closures by selling contracted properties to qualified buyers through strong relationships, strategic marketing, and skilled negotiation.



Your job is to ensure every deal is:

- marketed effectively

- matched with the right buyer

- sold at the highest possible price

- moved quickly to closing

- and communicated clearly across all parties



You are the bridge between contract ? buyer ? closing ? revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Buyer Relationship Management

- Build and maintain strong relationships with cash buyers, hedge funds, and investors

- Continuously grow and update the buyers list

- Understand each buyer’s criteria (location, price range, property type, condition)

- Maintain consistent communication with active buyers



Deal Marketing & Exposure

- Create and send deal blasts via
, SMS, and platforms

- Market deals through investor networks, marketplaces, and internal lists

- Position deals effectively to create urgency and competition

- Ensure all deal information is accurate and compelling



Sales & Negotiation

- Present deals to buyers and handle objections

- Negotiate pricing and terms to maximize assignment fees or profits

- Create competitive environments (multiple buyer interest)

- Lock in serious buyers with deposits and clear expectations



Transaction Coordination Support

- Ensure all documents are signed and submitted correctly

- Coordinate with title companies, buyers, and internal team

- Track deal progress from contract to close

- Proactively address issues that may delay closing



Pipeline Management

- Track all active deals and buyer activity

- Ensure no deal sits stagnant without action

- Maintain clean CRM records and notes

- Manage deal timelines and closing schedules



Collaboration with Acquisitions

- Provide feedback on deal quality and pricing

- Help acquisitions understand what will sell faster

- Align on offer strategies based on buyer demand



Performance Tracking

- Track KPIs (days to sell, assignment fees, close rate)

- Continuously improve deal velocity and profit margins



Client (Buyer) Experience

- Provide a professional, responsive, and reliable experience

- Build long-term buyer loyalty and repeat business



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves)



Sales & Negotiation Experience

- Proven ability to sell and negotiate deals

- Strong objection handling and closing ability

- Confident communicator who can control conversations



Communication (NON-NEGOTIABLE)

- Excellent English (spoken + written)

- Clear, professional, and responsive communication

- Ability to build trust with buyers quickly



Real Estate Knowledge (STRONGLY PREFERRED)

- Understanding of ARV, comps, repairs, and investor margins

- Familiar with wholesaling and assignment contracts

- Ability to analyze deal quality quickly



Buyer Psychology & Market Awareness

- Understands what investors look for in deals

- Knows how to position deals to create urgency

- Can match deals to the right buyers efficiently



CRM & Organization

- Experience using CRM systems (
, GHL, Podio, etc.)

- Strong tracking, note-taking, and organization skills



Professional Attributes

- Reliable and consistent

- Strong attention to detail

- Fast communicator

- Problem solver

- Results-driven mindset



Preferred Qualifications / Skills (Nice-to-Haves)

- Existing buyer network

- Experience with hedge funds / institutional buyers

- Experience in dispositions or real estate sales

- Familiar with
/SMS deal blasting tools

- Experience working remote with a sales team



Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

- Days to Sell (contract ? buyer secured)

- Assignment Fee / Profit per Deal

- Deals Sold Per Month

- Close Rate (contracts ? closed deals)

- Buyer Response Rate

- CRM Accuracy & Deal Tracking



Success Measures

- Deals are sold quickly and efficiently

- Maximum profit is achieved on each deal

- Strong, active buyers list is consistently growing

- Minimal deal fallout before closing

- Clear communication across acquisitions, buyers, and title

- Increased revenue and deal velocity for AceHOM Group



Compensation

Base + Commission OR Commission-Based (depending on experience)



Compensation is based on:

- Deal volume

- Profit per deal

- Speed of execution

- Reliability and communication



High performers have uncapped earning potential.



Contract Type

- Full-Time preferred

- Must be available during U.S. business hours



Location

- Remote (U.S. preferred, international considered if English is excellent)

- Reliable internet and work environment required



Growth Path

- Stage 1: Dispositions Manager

- Stage 2: Senior Dispositions (top performer / buyer network leader)

- Stage 3: Lead Dispositions Manager (manages team + strategy)

- Stage 4: Sales Director / Partner Role



Ideal Candidate Traits

- Strong negotiator

- Relationship builder

- Competitive and results-driven

- Organized and proactive

- Fast-moving and responsive

- Takes ownership of deal outcomes

- Thinks in terms of profit and efficiency



Example Tools You’ll Use

, Podio

Marketing:
, SMS, Investor platforms

Data: PropStream, DealMachine, Zillow, Redfin

title: Senior Project Manager / ClickUp Operations
description:
Company: Moe’s Group

Location: 100% Remote

Schedule: Full-time or Part-time (flexible based on candidate)

Industry: Skincare Manufacturing / Private Label / Product Development



About Moe’s Group

Moe’s Group is a growing skincare manufacturing company specializing in private label and

custom product development. We juggle a lot of moving parts — client projects, formulation,

ingredient sourcing, packaging, internal tasking, timelines, and cross-team communication. As

we scale, we need someone who can bring structure and accountability to how we operate.

What You’ll Be Doing



You’ll be the person who owns project management and operations across the entire company.

Right now, our information is scattered across Google Sheets, docs, and duplicate trackers —

your first mission is to consolidate everything into one clean, scalable ClickUp workspace and

make it the single source of truth.



From there, you’ll keep projects moving, identify bottlenecks before they blow up, report on

progress weekly, and continuously improve how our teams work together.

This is not a task-checker role. We want an operator who thinks in systems, takes initiative, and

drives things forward without being micromanaged.

Core Responsibilities



ClickUp System Ownership

• Build and own our ClickUp workspace end to end — folders, lists, statuses, dashboards,

automations, templates, recurring workflows, and views

• Make ClickUp the central source of truth for all operational project management

• Continuously refine the system as the business evolves



Cleanup & Consolidation

• Audit existing Google Sheets, docs, and trackers

• Consolidate scattered info into clean, standardized systems

• Kill duplicate and outdated tracking methods

• Document everything so teams know exactly where to go



Cross-Functional Project Management

• Manage projects across private label production, sourcing, packaging, team

coordination, and internal ops

• Follow up with the right people, chase deadlines, and keep handoffs smooth

• Track blockers, dependencies, and time-sensitive items before they become problems



Weekly Reporting

• Deliver clear weekly updates on project status, priorities, delays, and urgent items

• Build dashboards that give leadership instant visibility into what’s on track, what’s



overdue, and what needs attention

• Flag risks and bottlenecks early



Process Improvement

• Standardize recurring workflows

• Build SOPs, templates, and systems

• Drive a more disciplined project management culture across the company



HubSpot Support (Nice to Have)

• Connect sales handoff, client onboarding, and project kickoff between HubSpot and

ClickUp



What We’re Looking For

Required

• Proven experience as a Project Manager, Operations Manager, or Systems Manager

• Advanced, hands-on ClickUp expertise — you’ve built workspaces from scratch or

significantly rebuilt existing ones

• Track record managing multiple concurrent projects with many stakeholders

• Strong organizational skills and sharp attention to detail

• Excellent written and verbal English

• Self-starter who takes initiative without constant direction

• Comfortable with spreadsheets, data cleanup, workflow mapping, and documentation



Preferred

• Experience in manufacturing, skincare, cosmetics, product development, sourcing, or

supply chain

• Familiarity with private label or custom product workflows

• Working knowledge of HubSpot

• Experience building dashboards and operational reporting for leadership



What Success Looks Like (First 90 Days)

• Google Sheets chaos is consolidated into one clear ClickUp system

• Leadership has instant visibility into every active project

• Teams are aligned on deadlines, owners, and priorities

• Weekly reporting is consistent and actually useful

• Time-sensitive issues surface early, not late

• Projects move faster with less confusion



Compensation

Based on experience, skill level, and availability. Please include your expected monthly rate

when applying.



How to Apply

Send us:

1. A short intro about your project management background

2. Specific examples of ClickUp systems you’ve built or managed (screenshots or Loom

walkthroughs are a huge plus)

3. Any experience in manufacturing, skincare, sourcing, or operations

4. Any HubSpot experience

5. Examples of dashboards, workflows, templates, or reports you’ve created

6. Your expected monthly rate and availability (full-time or part-time hours)

We review every application. Candidates who follow the instructions above and include concrete

examples will be prioritized.



Learn more about our company by visiting our website:





For the latest updates and opportunities, follow us on LinkedIn:

www.
/company/moesgroup

title: Social Media Manager / Account Owner
description:
Join Our Team as a Social Media Manager/Account Owner

Make an Impact at Content BFF!



Who We Are

Content BFF is a women-owned social media management agency based in South Florida, helping established personal brands and businesses strategically amplify their online presence. We specialize in creating scroll-stopping content rooted in authentic storytelling that drives visibility, builds authority, and generates leads. Our culture is built on excellence, ownership, and bold creativity. We move fast, deliver quality, and celebrate client wins.



Who We're Looking For

We're not looking for "just a social media manager" or "just a video editor." We're looking for an Account Owner who thrives on taking complete ownership of content fulfillment, manages multiple accounts, ensures client success, and brings strategic thinking to every piece of content created.



If you're someone who:

Takes Ownership — You treat client accounts like they're your own business, proactively solving problems and driving results.

Thrives in Fast-Paced Environments — You juggle multiple clients, deadlines, and priorities without dropping the ball.

Creates Quality Content — Your edits are polished, your captions are compelling, and your graphics are on-brand.

Communicates Clearly — You keep clients informed, ask smart questions, and collaborate seamlessly with the team.

Loves Strategy — You don't just post content; you understand how each piece fits into the bigger picture.

Is Detail-Oriented — You catch typos, notice branding inconsistencies, and deliver work that's polished and professional.

Is Growth-Driven — You're always learning, open to feedback, and excited to level up your skills.



…then you might be the Account Owner we've been waiting for.





Position Details

Employment Type: Full-time contractor (1099)

Work Schedule: Flexible hours, remote work with set weekly deadlines

Expected Workload: Approximately 32 hours per week

Compensation: $10-15 USD/hour 

Client Load: 6 social media management clients

Platforms Managed: Instagram and TikTok - 
 to
, LinkedIn, YouTube Shorts, and Pinterest



What Makes This Role Exciting

Your Edits = Real Impact: You’ll help business owners grow their influence, income, and authority.

Diverse Client Portfolio: Work with established brands across industries including healthcare, wellness, law, real estate, and more.

Culture of Excellence: “Good enough” isn’t our standard. We raise the bar together, every project.

Feedback-Positive Team: We give and receive feedback often — because that’s how we all grow.

Ownership + Flexibility: Work from anywhere, manage your own schedule, and maintain work-life balance while delivering excellence.

Supportive Culture: Work with a CEO who values your expertise, provides clear direction, and celebrates your wins.

Growth Potential: You have the opportunity to gain more clients or move up in the organization.





What We Expect From You

Proven experience managing social media accounts with demonstrated growth results

Strong portfolio showcasing video editing, graphic design, and copywriting skills

Experience with CapCut (required) and Canva (required)

Experience with DaVinci Resolve (preferred but not required)

Understanding of Instagram and TikTok best practices

Video editing proficiency with storytelling, pacing, and trend integration

Compelling copywriting with strong hooks, CTAs, and brand voice adaptation

Graphic design skills for creating branded visual assets

Analytics interpretation and data-driven decision-making

Exceptional time management and organizational skills

High level of accountability and ownership

Proactive communication and problem-solving

Passion for social media and content creation

Commitment to delivering quality work on time, every time





How We Will Help You Succeed

Clear Systems & Processes: Access to documented workflows, templates, and SOPs to streamline your work.

Ongoing Training: Regular training on new features, trends, and best practices to keep your skills sharp.

Collaborative Support: Direct access to CEO for strategy discussions, feedback, and problem-solving.

Tools & Resources: Provided access to CapCut, Canva Pro, scheduling tools, and analytics platforms.

Feedback Culture: Constructive feedback that sharpens your skills and helps you deliver your best work.

Growth Opportunities: As you excel, opportunities to expand your role, take on more responsibility, or specialize.





Employment Type

This is a full-time contractor (1099) role. We are not looking for an agency.





Application Process

Please include the word "DIAMOND” after your name when you apply. Application link: 





We are hiring fast. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis, and we're looking to fill this position within 7 business days. If you're a strong fit, don't wait—apply now.

You will be calling businesses, building relationships, qualifying leads, and handing off opportunities to the closing team.



This is a home-based position. Candidates must have a quiet workspace, personal computer, stable high-speed internet (minimum 20 Mbps download/upload), and a noise-cancelling headset.



Key Responsibilities

• Make high-volume (
) outbound calls (cold and warm outreach) to qualify decision makers

• Pre-qualify opportunities and set up next steps for the closing team

• Follow up with leads consistently via phone,
, fax

• Maintain accurate notes, call logs, and pipeline updates in the CRM

Qualifications

title: Real Estate VA
description:
Description

We are looking for a Real Estate Virtual Assistant (VA) who will support real estate agents, property managers, or investors with administrative, marketing, and client management tasks remotely. This role helps streamline operations, enabling the client to focus on sales, client relationships, and business growth.

Administrative Support:

Manage calendars, schedule appointments, and coordinate meetings.

Handle
 management, respond to inquiries, and follow up on communications.

Prepare and organize documents, contracts, and listing agreements.

 or social media.

Proficiency in ASANA
