title: Review Dispute & Reputation Management Specialist (Short-Term Rentals)
description:
Location: Remote

Type: Full Time



About Us

We manage a growing portfolio of short-term rental properties across multiple platforms. Guest experience and account health are critical to our business, and we are looking for a specialist who understands how to professionally dispute and remove reviews that violate platform policies.



Role Overview

We are seeking an experienced Review Removal and Reputation Management Specialist for the short-term rental (STR) industry. Your primary responsibility will be to identify, escalate, and dispute unfair or policy-violating guest reviews across platforms such as Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com, without putting our listings or accounts at risk.



Key Responsibilities

Review guest feedback and identify reviews that violate platform policies

Prepare and submit professional, policy-based review removal requests

Communicate with platform support teams clearly and effectively

Communicate directly with guests and negotiate review revisions or removals

Track disputes, guest communications, and outcomes

Advise on best practices to reduce negative reviews and future risk

Work closely with operations and guest support teams when needed



Work Schedule

14 hours per day

6 days per week

Must be responsive during assigned hours and able to handle time-sensitive cases



Requirements

Proven experience with review disputes and removals in the STR or hospitality industry

Strong understanding of Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com review policies

Excellent written English and professional communication skills

Detail-oriented and highly organized

Ethical approach, no black-hat or risky methods

Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Nice to Have

Background in guest experience, trust & safety, or account health

Familiarity with Hostaway or other PMS tools



What We Offer

Fully remote work

Long-term opportunity with consistent volume

Clear SOPs and support from an established STR team



How to Apply

Please include:

A brief summary of your experience with review disputes

A working CV link (make sure to set the audience to Public)

Examples of successful review removals (no confidential info required)

title: HR Assistant
description:
HR Assistant



We are seeking an HR Assistant to support our growing and successful home health business. This position plays an important role in our daily operations and directly impacts our ability to provide excellent care to our clients.



The ideal candidate is organized, dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable managing multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment. This role is heavily focused on recruiting, applicant management, onboarding, employee file maintenance, and internal team support. We are looking for someone who genuinely cares about people, communicates professionally, and helps connect the right caregivers to the right clients.



What makes someone a great fit for this role



Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal

Bachelor’s degree in nursing or a healthcare-related field preferred

Mature, organized, and professional

Able to be both friendly and serious when needed

Prior office or administrative experience

Experience with Office 365, Airtable, CareerPlug, Microsoft Teams, and Indeed

Dependable, with a strong attendance record

Positive attitude and ability to work well with others

Strong customer service skills

Able to handle confidential information with professionalism and discretion



Key responsibilities



Recruit, interview, select, and onboard new staff

Manage applicant flow, including collecting, organizing, and reporting applicant information

Post and manage job advertisements

Conduct pre-screens, interviews, reference checks, and background checks

Support weekly hiring goals of approximately 60 pre-screens, 30 interviews, and 7 to 10 new hires

Answer phones, including general inquiries, intake calls, and other office calls

Build assessment packets and client packets

Create new hire packets

Maintain employee and client files in an organized and confidential manner

Conduct employee retention efforts, including stay interviews and regular check-ins with inactive caregivers

Participate in on-call rotation if needed

Assist with additional duties and responsibilities as needed



Additional duties



Ensure employees are informed about available benefits and assist with enrollment paperwork, changes, terminations, and annual open enrollment

Help answer employee benefit questions and direct them to the proper resources, carriers, or brokers when needed

Alert the Care Coordinator of upcoming staff evaluations

Assist with administrative personnel evaluations, disciplinary meetings, and terminations with input from the Scheduler and Care Coordinator

Oversee personnel files in accordance with agency policy and regulatory requirements, ensuring confidentiality and limited access to sensitive information

Provide employees with access to personnel files according to company policy

Support internal staff relations and company communications

Update employee forms, notices, and manuals as regulations or company policies change

Maintain a basic working knowledge of employment-related regulations



Why this role matters



This is a high-impact position within our company. The person in this role helps ensure we hire strong caregivers, stay organized and compliant, support our team well, and continue providing quality care to the clients and families we serve.

title: YouTube Video Editor
description:
I am looking for an experienced video editor to work with me on a weekly YouTube series. The videos will be short documentary-style stories that feel smart, polished, and high-quality. This is not fast, trend-based YouTube content. The goal is to create thoughtful, engaging videos that still perform well on YouTube.



The right person should understand both storytelling and how YouTube works. You should know how to build a strong episode by combining talking-to-camera footage with clips, photos, graphics, and other visuals in a smooth and clear way. Good pacing, clear storytelling, and keeping viewers interested are very important. I am looking for someone who can help create videos that feel cinematic and professional, but still easy to watch and engaging for YouTube.



You should also be comfortable finding and using outside media. This includes stock footage, archival clips, and images. You should know where to find high-quality materials and how to use content from platforms like YouTube when appropriate. A basic understanding of licensing and fair use is important. You should also be able to create clean, simple graphics, titles, and lower thirds that support the story without distracting from it.



Previous experience is required. You must share links to videos you have edited or worked on. If you do not include a portfolio or examples of your past work, your application will not be considered. It is best if you have experience with documentary-style or nonfiction content for YouTube or similar platforms. You should also be able to explain your role in each project and what you contributed.



This is an ongoing role. I am looking for someone reliable who can work about five to 20 hours per week, depending on needs. The schedule is flexible, but consistency is very important since we will be producing videos every week. Clear communication and dependability are key.



This is a great opportunity for steady, long-term work if we are a good fit. I am happy to build a strong working relationship and continue collaborating over time.



If you enjoy thoughtful storytelling, understand YouTube, and want to help build a high-quality docu-series, I would love to hear from you.

title: Detail Detective – Video Transaction Reviewer
description:
Job Summary

The Transaction Auditor is responsible for accurately processing customer purchase transactions across all market locations. This role involves reviewing video footage to verify items taken, encoding items into the system with correct quantities, and ensuring that all daily transactions are completed with precision and consistency.



This position requires strong attention to detail, high levels of focus, patience for repetitive tasks, and a strong sense of accountability.



Key Responsibilities

- Review video footage to verify customer purchases.

- Identify items taken and accurately encode them into the system, including correct quantities.

- Process transactions efficiently, averaging 1 to 2 minutes per transaction.

- Ensure all transactions for the assigned shift or day are completed.

- Flag inconsistencies, discrepancies, and any other i
.

- Escalate and report irregularities, suspicious activity, or system issues promptly.

- Maintain high accuracy levels, especially when distinguishing between similar-looking items.

- Ensure consistent attendance and availability during assigned working hours.

- Follow established procedures and maintain confidentiality of footage and transaction data.





Qualifications

- High attention to detail and strong visual accuracy.

- Ability to maintain focus for extended periods.

- Patient and comfortable performing repetitive tasks throughout the day.

- Strong sense of responsibility and commitment to completing daily workload.

- Ability to detect inconsistencies and exercise sound judgment.

- Basic computer proficiency and ability to quickly learn transaction systems.

- Strong integrity and reliability.

- Good written and verbal communication skills for reporting issues.

- Must demonstrate consistent attendance and punctuality.





Preferred Attributes

- Experience in transaction processing, auditing, or retail operations is an advantage.

- Experience reviewing CCTV footage is a plus.

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision.

- Strong organizational and time management skills.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3. Add the Letters "TA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. TA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: Video Editor (Short Form & Long Form)
description:
About us

BrightOwl Labs is a Dutch coaching company that helps coaches, consultants, and experts build and grow their businesses. We create content across Instagram (reels), YouTube (long-form videos), and Meta ads. Our team is small, focused, and growing fast.



What we're looking for

A video editor who takes full ownership of their work. Someone who delivers clean, engaging edits with minimal back-and-forth — and who gets sharper over time without needing to be micromanaged. If you take pride in your craft and want to grow with a company long-term, this is for you.



What the work looks like (for now - might be more in the future)

- ~3 short-form reels per week (Instagram, 30–90 seconds)

- 2–3 long-form videos per month (10–30 minutes, YouTube)

- Occasional short ads (Meta/Instagram, similar to reels)



We provide clear briefings: exact timestamps for cuts, plus the first and last two words of each segment. Content is in Dutch — you don't need to speak Dutch, but you'll work with Dutch auto-generated subtitles.



What we expect

- Short-form delivered within 24 hours

- Long-form delivered within 48–72 hours

- Proactive communication — ask before you start, not after

- Proactive communication — keep us posted on how long you expect tasks to take

- WhatsApp response within 4 hours during your working hours

- Task tracking via Notion

- Over time: less feedback needed as you learn our style



Requirements

- Minimum 2 years of video editing experience

- Strong portfolio with both short-form and long-form work

- Available for ongoing, long-term collaboration

- Comfortable working per deliverable, not hourly



Compensation

- Short-form reels & ads: $10–30 per video

- Long-form videos: $75–100 per video

- Paid monthly via Wise

Salary provided is an indication, as we will be working per deliverable, not hourly



How to apply

Start your message with the word "OWL" (this tells us you've actually read this). Then share:

1. A link to your portfolio or recent work

2. Two short-form and one long-form example you're proud of

3. Answer this: How do you make sure an edit feels right before you deliver it?



Shortlisted candidates will be invited for a paid test edit.

About QB Commerce



QB Commerce is a fast-growing US-operating jewelry e-commerce brand selling worldwide. We ship internationally through global fulfillment and in less than 9 months we scaled to a team of 40+ people. We move fast, we hire smart, and we build a team of specialists who are the best at what they do. title: Senior Video Editor (US-Based Brand | PST Schedule)
description:
Application Requirements:

1. Use at least 10AP for your application.

2. Include "Senior Video Editor Pro" in your subject line.



Note: Applications missing either requirement will not be considered.

_________________________________________________________



About Veritas Vans

Veritas Vans builds the most trusted accessories for Starlink Mini and Starlink Standard. Our mission is to give people the freedom to work, explore, and stay connected anywhere. From Baja coastlines to deep forest trails, our customers rely on our gear for capability, protection, and unlimited connection.



Your role is to help visually tell this story across all platforms.



Role Overview

We are hiring a Senior Video Editor who can own our long-form YouTube content, high-retention short-form content, and graphic design needs. You must be highly experienced, creative, fast, and able to work autonomously within a growing brand.



Responsibilities



Video Editing – Long Form

- Edit 6–15 minute YouTube videos with strong retention, pacing, and narrative clarity.

- Add b-roll, overlays, captions, music, and brand-consistent graphics.

- Build engaging openings with proven YouTube hook methods.



Video Editing – Short Form

- Execute the Hook ? Retain ? Reward method for Reels, TikTok, and Shorts.

- Add dynamic subtitles, zooms, cuts, 
 inserts, and pacing adjustments.

- Produce scroll-stopping, high-retention content.



Graphic Design & Photo Editing

- Create YouTube thumbnails and graphic assets.

- Design text treatments, overlays, and promotional visuals.

- Edit lifestyle and product photos for multi-platform use.



Brand Storytelling

- Align all edits with our brand themes: freedom, connection, capability, control.

- Contribute creative ideas and concepts for future video content.



AI-Driven Editing & Workflow Optimization

- Use AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, Topaz, Descript, etc.) as a core part of your editing workflow.

- Generate high-performing hooks, captions, and on-screen text callouts using AI.

- Use AI to research and improve storytelling, pacing, and content structure.

- Continuously explore and implement new AI workflows to improve output quality, speed, and efficiency.

- Leverage AI to enhance both creative output and production throughput, not just assist basic tasks.



Cross-Platform Optimization

- Edit in multiple aspect ratios: 16:9, 9:16, 4:5, 1:1.

- Prepare final deliverables in organized, structured folders.

- Optimize content for YouTube, Instagram, TikTok,
.



Collaboration

- Work closely with the content team and leadership.

- Follow SOPs and meet deadlines consistently.

- Join scheduled calls proactively (no reminders required)

- Be punctual and prepared for feedback sessions



Work Discipline & Delivery Standards

- Be actively available and responsive during working hours (PST schedule).

- Address tasks, revisions, and team communication within working hours.

- Meet deadlines consistently and communicate early if delays occur.

- Submit deliverables early in the workday whenever possible to allow time for review and revisions.



Quality & Output Standards

- Deliver edits that are near publish-ready on first submission.

- Ensure drafts require minimal revisions and are not incomplete or partially executed.

- Perform a full self-review before submission to ensure:

- all feedback is applied

- no new issues are introduced

- output meets brand and quality standards

- Maintain consistently high production quality across all deliverables.



Note:

Include the phrase “Senior Video Editor Pro” in your subject line. Applications missing this phrase will not be considered. Use at least 5AP for your application.



Required Skills



- Ability to work graveyard shift (PST hours)

- 3–5+ years professional video editing experience

- Expert in Adobe Premiere Pro

- Strong skills in After Effects, Photoshop, Illustrator, or Figma

- Proven experience editing YouTube content and high-performing short-form videos

- Strong understanding of retention, pacing, story structure, and attention engineering

- Experience creating high-converting thumbnails

- Strong understanding of modern content trends across YouTube, Instagram, and TikTok

- Ability to edit lifestyle, outdoor, product, and UGC-style content



AI & Workflow Skills (Required)

- Strong proficiency in using AI tools (ChatGPT, Adobe AI, etc.) within editing workflows

- Ability to generate hooks, captions, and on-screen text using AI

- Experience using AI to improve storytelling, pacing, and video performance

- Ability to research and implement new AI workflows to improve efficiency and output quality



Work Ethic & Discipline

- Highly reliable, responsive, and accountable

- Strong attention to detail and ability to self-review work

- Ability to follow feedback precisely and minimize repeated revisions



Bonus Experience

- Motion graphics or animation skills.

- Experience in e-commerce, outdoor brands, or creator channels.

- Understanding of YouTube SEO (titles, thumbnails, keywords).

- Ability to generate ideas for hooks, storylines, and visual treatments.



What We Offer

- Long-term employment with growth potential.

- Competitive salary based on experience.

- Consistent weekly workload.

- Direct impact on a fast-scaling global brand.

- Creative freedom and an opportunity to lead our video direction.



How to Apply



Submit the following:

- Resume

- Short explanation of why you’re the right fit

- Brief explanation of how you use AI in your editing workflow

- 1 example where you improved video performance (retention, CTR, etc.)

- Portfolio of your best long-form and short-form edits

- Links to YouTube channels or brands you’ve edited for



Learn About Us:









Website:

title: Instagram Virtual Assistant | 10+ Accounts | Full-Time Remote
description:
We are an established, profitable agency hiring a full-time Instagram Account Manager to handle 10+ accounts daily. We pay in USDT, we have real structure, and we are building a team around the right people.



If you've been looking for a role where your work actually matters, where you're trusted with real responsibility, where you get paid properly and treated like a professional, keep reading.



This Is Not a Generic VA Role



We don't need someone to do random tasks. We need someone who can own multiple Instagram accounts, run them cleanly every day, and hold themselves to a high standard without being micromanaged.



We have SOPs. We have systems. We communicate well. You won't be left guessing what to do. But we expect you to show up, execute, and care about the quality of your work the same way we care about ours.



What Your Day Actually Looks Like



You log in and check your accounts. You review what needs to be posted, confirm the content matches the right account, format, and caption style. You post on schedule. You run through each account's engagement playbook: commenting, liking, story viewing, DM conversations. You check metrics and note anything that looks off. You log everything in your tracking sheet. You edit a few raw clips into Reels or stories. At the end of your shift, you send a clean report of what was done and what needs attention.



Then you do it again tomorrow. And the day after that. The people who thrive here are the ones who find satisfaction in doing consistent, high-quality work, not people who get bored after a week.



Your Responsibilities



· Manage 10+ Instagram accounts daily, each with its own branding, voice, and schedule

· Post the right content at the right time in the right format (Reels, stories, carousels, feed)

· Handle daily engagement: commenting, liking, story viewing, follow/unfollow based on each account's instructions

· Manage DMs across accounts, including scripted conversations that drive engagement

· Edit raw content into polished Instagram posts using CapCut, Canva, or similar

· Research competitors and trends to support content strategy

· Track all daily actions in Google Sheets

· Monitor performance metrics, flag issues, and suggest improvements

· Understand Instagram's content policies and know how to maximize reach without getting flagged

· Keep all account information, content, and business details strictly confidential



What You Need



· A solid computer or laptop (8GB+ RAM, SSD preferred). Everything runs from your computer. If your machine is slow, your work will be slow.

· Reliable internet (50Mbps+ download). If your connection drops regularly, this won't work.

· 6 to 8 hours per day, 5 to 7 days per week.

· Strong written English. You'll write captions, handle DMs, and send daily reports. Quality matters.

· Ability to follow detailed instructions the same way, every time, across multiple accounts.

· Comfort working with content that may not be suitable for all audiences. We'll discuss this further in the application.

· Real organizational skills. Managing 10+ accounts means 10+ sets of rules, 10+ posting schedules, 10+ brand voices. If that sounds overwhelming, this isn't the role. If it sounds like a challenge you'd enjoy, keep going.



What We'd Love to See (Not Required, But It Helps)



· Experience managing 3+ Instagram accounts at the same time

· Caption writing and content posting experience

· DM management experience

· Short-form video editing (CapCut, Canva, Premiere)

· Competitor research and trend analysis

· Google Sheets reporting (tracking, formulas, daily logs)

· Understanding of how the Instagram algorithm works

· Experience working with accounts in niche or sensitive categories



What We Pay



$300 to $1,500+ USD per month, depending on your experience and how many accounts you can handle well. Raises and bonuses are performance-based and built into the role. We don't cap what you can earn. If you produce results, your compensation grows.



We are not looking for the cheapest hire. We are looking for the best one.



Where This Can Go



This isn't a dead-end position. The right person will take on more accounts, earn more, and eventually lead a team of account managers. That growth path is real. It's earned through performance, consistency, and trust, but it's there for anyone who wants it.



Several people on our current team started where you'd be starting. They stayed because the work is stable, the pay is fair, and the growth is real.



Who Should NOT Apply



· You're not available 6 to 8 hours a day, 5 to 7 days a week

· Your computer is old, slow, or unreliable

· Your internet drops regularly

· You're careless with details or forget things easily

· You want something casual, temporary, or low-responsibility

· You can't keep business information confidential



How to Apply



Fill out our application form carefully. We read every answer, and how you fill out this form tells us a lot about how you'd do the job.







If your application is vague, rushed, or incomplete, we won't move forward. If it's thoughtful and shows you actually read this post, you'll hear from us.

title: Salesforce Admin (Part-Time, Remote) – Implementation Focus
description:
We are looking for a practical, detail-oriented Salesforce Admin to implement a defined system structure and workflows.



This is not a role for designing from scratch. The system architecture, pricing model, and data structure will be provided. Your role is to execute and implement cleanly and accurately.



What you will be doing:



Implement Salesforce structure based on a defined blueprint

Create and configure custom objects, fields, and relationships

Build Flows (record-triggered, scheduled) based on clear requirements

Set up price books and product structures 

Import and manage structured CSV data (supplier price lists)

Ensure data is clean, consistent, and usable

Support integration with WooCommerce via the existing API

Test and validate outputs to ensure everything works correctly



What we are looking for:



Strong hands-on experience with Salesforce Admin (Flows, validation rules, objects)

Experience working with structured data and imports (CSV)

Attention to detail and the ability to follow defined processes exactly

Comfortable working with product and pricing data

Ability to test your own work and spot issues early



Important:



This is an implementation role, not a strategy or design role. You will be working from a defined structure, so the ability to execute accurately is critical.



Nice to have:



Experience with WooCommerce integrations

Experience handling product catalogues or pricing data

Basic understanding of APIs



Hours and rate:



Part-time, flexible

Ongoing work available

Please include your hourly rate and availability



Application Instructions:



To apply, please include:



A brief example of a Salesforce system you have implemented (not designed, but actually built)

A short explanation of how you have worked with product data or pricing inside Salesforce

Your experience with CSV imports and data cleaning

Your hourly rate and availability



Please answer this question:



If you are given a CSV file with supplier pricing (product, quantity tiers, costs), how would you approach importing this into Salesforce so it can be used for quoting?



Important Notes:



We are not looking for high-level or generic answers

We are looking for clear, practical thinking and real experience

If you mainly have experience with leads, campaigns, or basic admin tasks, this role may not be suitable



What success looks like in this role:



You can take a defined structure and implement it without confusion

Data is clean, consistent, and reliable

Pricing and products work correctly inside Salesforce

The system is simple for the team to use day-to-day



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys building clean systems, working with structured data, and making things work properly without overcomplicating them

title: Dental Claims Submitter
description:
We are seeking an experienced Dental Claims Submitter to join our insurance team for a multi location dental practice. This is a fully remote position supporting U.S.-based dental practices. The primary focus of this role is auditing patient accounts to ensure accurate and complete insurance claim and pre-authorization submissions. The ideal candidate will be detail-oriented, knowledgeable in dental procedures and ADA Coding, and comfortable reviewing clinical documentation and radiographs to support insurance narratives.



*** Must have denticon experience, CDT Coding experience and be able to read x-rays *** 



Primary Responsibilities:



Audit patient accounts to ensure claims are accurate, complete, and compliant prior to submission. 



Correct coding and/or other errors prior to submission. 



Submit dental insurance claims and pre-authorizations through Denticon



Review and interpret dental X-rays to assist in writing clear and accurate clinical narratives



Attach all required documentation (X-rays, narratives, perio charts, intraoral photos, etc.) to claims and pre-authorizations



Follow up on submitted claims and pre-authorizations with insurance carriers



Respond to insurance requests for additional information in a timely manner

title: Digital Marketing Manager ($12–$15/hr, Full-Time)
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Digital Marketing Manager to help execute and scale core growth initiatives across outbound, paid acquisition, lead generation, and CRM operations.



This is not a basic assistant role. You will be responsible for executing important parts of our growth engine. You should be someone who takes ownership, moves fast, and figures things out without needing constant direction.



We’re building one of the fastest-growing companies in our space, and this role is directly tied to that growth.



This is a night shift role that operates M-F 9am-5pm EST (USA, East Coast time).



What You’ll Be Responsible For:



- Executing outbound meta, instantly, reddit, etc. campaigns.

- Building, organizing, and improving lead lists and targeting data

- Researching and qualifying potential opportunities using clear criteria

- Keeping systems organized, accurate, and running smoothly

- Turning ideas into consistent, repeatable execution



You are:



- Extremely detail-oriented

- Fast to learn new systems

- Highly organized and process-driven

- Someone who takes pride in doing things correctly

- Comfortable working across multiple tools and platforms

- Comfortable working with data, lists, and structured workflows

- You don’t wait for instructions. You figure things out and keep things moving.



What We’re Looking For:



- Strong written English

- Experience with marketing tools, CRMs, or data-heavy workflows

- Experience with outbound or lead generation

- Experience supporting paid ads

- Experience working in SaaS or e-commerce

- Experience managing or cleaning data



Compensation:



- $12 to $15/hour (based on experience and performance)

- Full-time (40 hours/week)

- Long-term role



We are looking for someone who can grow with us. Strong performance will be rewarded quickly.



How to Apply (Important):



To be considered, include the following:

1. A short introduction (keep it concise) + the tools or platforms you’ve used before

2. Tell me the best marketing thing you've done!

3 . Include the word "Operator" in your application subject line



Final Note:



This role is for someone who wants to become very strong in modern growth execution. You will gain hands-on experience across multiple areas of marketing and operations, and you will be trusted to own meaningful work.

title: CRM Manager
description:
Job Overview

We are seeking a highly organized and analytical CRM Manager to oversee and optimize our Customer Relationship Management (CRM) system for our growing real estate team. The CRM Manager will play a critical role in managing lead flow, ensuring data integrity, supporting the Inside Sales Agent (ISA) team, and driving conversion through automation, reporting, and process optimization.

The ideal candidate understands real estate lead pipelines, sales processes, and CRM automation, and can translate data into actionable insights that improve agent productivity and lead conversion.



Key Responsibilities

CRM System Management 

Manage and maintain the company’s CRM platform - Follow-up Boss





Ensure accurate lead routing, tagging, and pipeline stage management.





Maintain CRM data integrity by auditing duplicate records and incomplete entries.





Customize fields, workflows, pipelines, and automation.





Lead Management & Distribution

Oversee inbound lead flow from multiple sources (portals, ads, website, referrals).





Configure and monitor lead routing rules for agents and ISA teams.





Ensure timely follow-up and accountability for assigned leads.





Track response times and lead conversion performance.





Automation & Campaign Management

Build and manage automated
 and SMS nurture campaigns.





Create drip campaigns for buyer, seller, FSBO, expired, and long-term nurture leads.





Develop workflow automations to streamline follow-ups and tasks.





Sales & ISA Support

Work closely with the Inside Sales Agent (ISA) team and agents to ensure CRM processes support daily outreach.





Monitor lead pipeline activity and appointment setting performance.





Implement systems that improve contact rates and conversion.





Reporting & Analytics

Generate weekly and monthly reports on:





Lead sources





Appointment set vs showed





Conversion rates





Pipeline performance





Create dashboards to track sales KPIs and agent productivity.





Identify opportunities to improve lead conversion and pipeline efficiency.





Process Optimization

Develop CRM SOPs and best practices for agents and staff.





Train agents and tea
mbers on proper CRM usage.





Continuously improve workflows to increase efficiency.

title: Sales Presenter
description:
About the Role



One Janitorial is looking for a high-performing Sales Presenter to conduct online presentations, build tailored cleaning proposals, and close deals.



This is a performance-driven role — not a training ground. We’re looking for someone who can hit the ground running and close.



What You’ll Be Doing



• Conduct 5–10 minute discovery calls and full screen-share presentations

• Identify client needs and tailor proposals in real time

• Build custom cleaning checklists and pricing during the call

• Confidently present proposals and close deals on the spot or manage follow-ups

• Handle objections (pricing, contracts, decision-makers, competitors)

• Conduct pre-call confirmations to prepare prospects

• Maintain accurate records and pipeline in HubSpot



You’re a Fit If You



• Have proven B2B sales closing experience (non-negotiable)

• Are confident running live screen-share presentations

• Can handle objections naturally (not overly script-dependent)

• Build rapport quickly and control conversations

• Are results-driven, coachable, and competitive

• Have CRM experience (HubSpot is a plus)



What We Offer



• $2,600 CAD/month base salary

• Uncapped commission (top performers earn significantly more)

• Qualified leads — no cold calling

• Proven scripts, frameworks, and onboarding support

• Fully remote role



???? Application Requirement (MANDATORY)



Submit a 2–3 minute introduction video (via Loom or any accessible platform) answering:



1. Tell us about your B2B sales experience — what do you sell and what are your results?

2. Walk us through how you run a sales presentation — from discovery to closing

3. How do you handle objections, especially when a prospect pushes back on price?

4. What makes you confident you can close deals in this role immediately?



Keep your video concise, clear, and professional. We’re looking for strong communicators who can sell.



Apply Here:







Only applicants with a video submission will be considered.

title: Social Media Outreach Assistant — Remote, Long-Term
description:
Freedom Academy is a DeFi passive income coaching business. We help everyday people generate passive income through a proven system, no trading, no complexity. We're growing and building a team that grows with us, with good year to year retention and student testimonials.



We're looking for a long-term outreach partner to own our Instagram DM pipeline. Not a short gig. Not a trial. If you show up and deliver, this role grows with you.



What this role is:

Volume outreach. You'll be sending hundreds of DMs weekly to targeted leads, managing follow-up sequences, and keeping our pipeline moving. Disciplined, consistent, results-driven. If you need hand-holding to stay active, this isn't for you. If you know how to hit a number and keep hitting it, keep reading.



What you'll do:

- Send high-volume outbound DMs to new followers and scraped lead lists daily

- Use our targeting system (Google Sheets + AI tools) to find and prioritize prospects

- Manage follow-up and re-offer flows via ManyChat

- Keep lead tracking accurate and up to date

- Report daily KPIs: sent, replies, conversations opened

- Flag what's working and what's not





What we're looking for:

- Strong conversational written English: real and natural, not scripted

- Comfortable with volume: this is not a low-activity role

- Experience with Instagram outreach, DM campaigns, or social media work

- Reliable with tools: ManyChat, Google Sheets, basic AI tools

- Self-managed: you execute without being chased

- Here for the long term





One thing upfront:

We've seen a lot of applications with impressive words and weak track records. We're not interested in that. If you've done the work, show us. Real numbers, real results, real experience. A honest application from someone who's actually done outreach beats a polished pitch from someone who hasn't every single time.



Don't tell us what you think we want to hear. Tell us what you've actually done.



The growth path, for the right person:

If you consistently hit volume targets and show you can actually move people, cold, unaware people, from a DM into genuine interest, we'll invest in you. That means training in our full appointment setting framework. Learning how to pre-sell, build belief, and guide cold prospects toward booking a call without pressure. Real sales skill, not scripts.



The bar to get there is simple: your actions match your words, your volume is consistent, and you show you understand how to move people, not just message them. Hit that bar and the role evolves. Base stays. Commission on booked calls gets added on top. Your earning potential scales with your results. We're not handing this out. We're offering it to whoever earns it.



Compensation:

- Monthly base pay (discussed on interview, competitive and stable)

- Performance bonuses for hitting volume targets

- Commission pathway for the right person as the role grows



To apply:

Record a 2-3 minute Loom video. No scripts, no fancy intro. Just tell us who you are, what outreach or sales work you've actually done, and why you're built for a volume role like this. Raw and real beats polished and hollow. Every time.



Then send your application through message here. Your message must start with the word "OUTBOUND" followed by:



Your Loom link (Quick 4-5 min intro video) in which you cover:

Why you want to be part of Freedom Academy specifically

Why this role is the right fit for where you are right now



No "OUTBOUND" word = no review. No Loom = no review. Written applications without both will not be considered.



We wish everyone best of luck,



Team Freedom

title: Prepress / Artwork QA Specialist
description:
About Us



We are a UK-based signage and vehicle graphics company producing high volumes of artwork for print. Accuracy is critical — mistakes lead to costly reprints, so we are building a dedicated QA process to ensure every file is 100% correct before production.



Role Overview



We are looking for a detail-obsessed QA specialist to check artwork before it goes to print.



This is NOT a creative design role. Your responsibility is to carefully inspect files and ensure they are accurate, correctly scaled, and match the customer brief exactly.



You will be the final checkpoint before production.



Key Responsibilities

Check all artwork against the original job brief before print

Verify measurements and scaling (especially vehicle wheelbase and layout)

Ensure correct use of templates and positioning

Check all text:

spelling

phone numbers

 addresses

URLs

Confirm correct icons, branding, and layout rules are followed

Open and review files in Adobe Illustrator and/or Adobe Acrobat

Ensure files are print-ready (no missing elements, correct setup)

Flag ANY issues clearly before approval

Complete a QA checklist for every job

Important



You must be comfortable saying:



“This job is NOT ready for print”



Accuracy is more important than speed.



Requirements

Strong attention to detail (this is the most important requirement)

Experience in:

print production, signage, OR prepress checking

Ability to read and compare job briefs carefully

Good written English

Comfortable working with measurements and layouts

Experience using Adobe Illustrator and/or Adobe Acrobat

Reliable and consistent

Nice to Have (Not Required)

Experience with vehicle graphics or large format print

Understanding of scale drawings or templates

How to Apply



To apply, you must complete a short test:



We will provide sample artwork files with intentional mistakes.

Your task is to identify ALL errors before print.



This is the most important part of the hiring process.



Why Join Us

Long-term, stable work

Clear systems and processes

Opportunity to grow with the business

Performance-based increases

Working Hours



Flexible, but must overlap with UK working hours for communication when needed.



Pay



Based on experience (part-time to start, with opportunity to increase)



Final Note



We are looking for someone who takes pride in catching mistakes others miss.



If you are highly detail-oriented and enjoy checking work for accuracy, we want to hear from you.

title: Direct Response Video Editor
description:
We are Germany’s fastest growing 7-figure DTC health brand looking for a Direct Response Video Editor who can turn raw content into scroll-stopping, high-converting creatives, without being told what to do at every step.



You’ll be working directly with the founder, gaining deep insight into high-converting video scripts and what makes people click, watch, and buy. This is a performance-driven role, we’re not looking for a “video cutter”, but someone who understands direct response marketing psychology and takes full ownership of the creative output.



You’ll receive raw footage from creators and will be responsible for everything: editing, captions, B-roll selection, punchy sound design, overlays, text effects, and pacing. You must know what good B-roll looks like and which clips increase retention, emotional impact, and conversions.



We can deliver raw material for 3-5 creative concepts (á 3-5 hooks each) per week, mostly long-form VSLs. Speed, clarity, and results matter.



Your Responsibilities:

– Turn raw content into performance-optimized ads

– Add captions, hooks, SFX, overlays, emojis

– Choose B-roll that adds conversion power (no boring stock footage)

– Understands conversion psychology

– Implement best practices from Direct Response Advertising

– Work directly with the founder and learn what truly makes an ad convert

- Continuously improve based on ad performance & feedback



Requirements:

– Proven experience editing Direct Response Ads (Strong Portfolio REQUIRED)

– Full stack AI knowledge (Sora, Kling AI, Nano Banana, Elevenlabs etc.)

– Understanding of performance psychology & funnel structure

– Strong motion graphics skills (After Effects, CapCut, or similar)

– Fast turnaround time

– Fluent in English (even better if German)

– Proactive, independent, hungry to grow



Bonus requirements:

– Experience in health, wellness or DTC products

- Medical knowledge



Ready to apply?

- Send us 2–3 of your best ad edits + your hourly rate

- Optional: Include 1 creative you wish you had edited (with a link)



Note: DON’T apply if you’re looking for a “regular video cutting job”. This is a performance driven role, where you’ll work side-by-side with the founder.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

Channel Reference:

title: Senior YouTube Long Form Editor ($200–$350 per Video) – Retention Focused
description:
We are looking for a HIGH-LEVEL YouTube long-form editor who understands retention, pacing, and storytelling — not just cutting clips together.



This is NOT basic editing.

We work with international creators (mostly English-speaking audiences) and we need editors who can match high-performing YouTube standards.



What You’ll Be Editing:

• 8–20 minute YouTube videos

• Talking head + dynamic B-roll

• Retention-based pacing

• Motion graphics and clean transitions

• Story-driven content



What We Expect:

• Strong understanding of YouTube retention

• Clean cuts and audio work

• Good sense of pacing (no dead 
nts)

• Ability to follow references precisely

• Organized timelines and structured project files

• Reliable communication



Software:

• Premiere Pro (required)

• After Effects (preferred but not mandatory)



Compensation:



$200–$350 per video

Rate depends on skill level and performance.



We value quality and reliability



Important:



This role is project-based but long-term. We prefer stable, professional editors.

title: Community Development Representative El Nido and Coron, Palawan
description:
Lani is an AI guest communication system built for independent boutique hotels, restaurants,

dive shops, surf schools, and activity operators. She handles guest inquiries on WhatsApp,

, Instagram, and
 — responding instantly, in the business’s own voice, around

the clock. She captures bookings, responds to reviews, and follows up with guests before and

after their stay. While the owners sleep.



We are hiring one Community Development Representative to cover El Nido and Coron — two

of the Philippines’ most extraordinary dive and eco-tourism destinations. This is one role

covering both areas.



The Role

The right person already belongs to one or both of these communities — or could walk into

them tomorrow and feel completely at home. This is not a traditional sales role. There is no cold

calling, no script, and no pressure. Your job is to introduce Lani to independent business owners

you already know and trust, show them what she can do for their specific business, and build

relationships that grow over time.

Lani sells herself. Your job is to get her in front of the right people.



What We Are Looking For

Someone with genuine roots in El Nido, Coron, or both. Experience in hospitality, dive, eco-

tourism, food and beverage, or island activities is a significant advantage. Comfortable with


 and
. Warm, curious, and genuinely invested in the success of the people

around them.



Compensation

• Guaranteed monthly base salary — paid bi-weekly

• Commission on every client signed

• Perpetual residual income that grows as your book of clients grows — a book that you

own — and continues as long as they stay with Lani

• First client bonus of $500 USD paid within 48 hours of client payment clearing

• Travel expenses covered



How to Apply



Send a WhatsApp message or
 introducing yourself. Please tell us:

• Which area you are based in — El Nido, Coron, or both — and how long you have lived or

worked there

• Your background and how you know these communities

• The salary range you are looking for

• Write your name backwards somewhere in your message

We are not looking for a polished cover letter. We are looking for a real person who genuinely

belongs somewhere we want to be.



We are in this community together.

title: Project Coordinator
description:
We are seeking a dynamic, service-driven individual who thrives in working in a fast-paced, relationship-rich environment. In this role, the Project Coordinator will support a sales team, coordinate and track projects from beginning to end and provide effective customer service to tea
mbers, customers and factories concerning the details of the project.



Responsibilities:

- Track ship dates and shipments to delivery; communicates with customers regarding updates

- Maintain CRM database with bid and project information

- Plan and Specifications

- Collaborate regularly with Parts, Service and Accounting (invoicing coordination); prepare reports regularly

- Sales forecasting; backing management

- Communicate effectively with tea
mbers, customers and factories concerning details of project 

- Warranty administration:

- Order service parts

- Pursue reimbursements

- Pursue order acknowledgement 

- Track shipment from factory

- Manage receipt and distribution of all closeout materials to customers:

- Installation operation and maintenance manuals – IOMs

- Warranty

- Spare parts

- Startup reports

- Assist with distribution and receipt of submittals

- Generate, interpret and print reports and other materials

- Fax, copy, enter data/orders and provide other clerical support to sales team



The Required Profile:

- Associate’s Degree in business or related field and 3+ years’ experience in customer service, project coordination or     administrative role; or 5-7 years’ equivalent combination of education and experience

- Ability to prioritize, multi-task, deal with ambiguity and manage high volume projects

- Strong PC skills in Microsoft Office including Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and Outlook

- HVAC, mechanical contracting, engineering or construction industry experience a plus



Other Skills/Abilities



Strategic Skills: 

Ability to learn new skills and knowledge. Ability to understand concepts and complexity comfortably.  Open to change and will try anything to find solutions.  Able to handle uncertainty and make decisions without knowing the whole story



Operating Skills:

Ability to discern between tasks to determine how best to accomplish goals and organize task/people assignments to get results in a timely way. Ability to figure out processes and simplify them in order to maximize work flow. 



Behavior Skills: 

Ability to manage people and situations when conflicts arise.  Ability to seize opportunities with the drive to complete goals.  



Personal and Interpersonal Skills: 

Ability to establish and grow relationships with customers through effective verbal and written communication.  Dedicated to the needs of the customers, manufacturers and peers and has the patience to actively listen to all business partners. Able to solve problems and skillfully negotiate with a minimum of noise while managing stress.  Demonstrates integrity and trust through appropriate directness and truthfulness.  Ability to understand personal strengths and weaknesses, seek feedback and improve upon shortcomings.

 & Instagram).

Adding music, captions, pacing, and effects to make the content engaging and scroll-stopping

Editing 60-second UGC videos and turning them into strong ad creatives

Experience creating ads, not just content

Your job is to create great ad creatives using the content we provide.

Examples of ads you’ve created before



If you’ve worked on performance creatives before, we’d love to see your work.

Portfolio or samples (especially ads)

A short note about your experience with Meta ad creatives



Looking forward to working together.

title: paralegal
description:
Many first responders are afflicted with heart disease, hypertension, hepatitis, chronic back injuries, hearing loss and more. Our firm proudly represents first responders and help them navigate workers’ compensation, disability pension, Social Security disability, personal injury claims. We’re proud of the work we do to help our first responders and we’re seeking an experienced paralegal to join our team.





Ideal candidate: 2-5 years of paralegal experience, preferable in the area of workers' compensation, eager to contribute to the team, is tech savvy and seeking a career in a fast-paced law firm.



Duties include but are not limited to:



·         Manage calendar and scheduling for depositions, motions, and hearings including drafting associated pleadings.

·         Handle new files by preparing initial documents, motions, notices, and pleadings.

·         E-file motions, pleadings, and notices with the Judge's office.

·         Communicate with clients to confirm events, provide case status updates, and address inquiries; forward documents for signature.

·         Request medical records and initiate follow up.

·         Prepare document composites for IME, trials, and hearings.

·         Review and respond to incoming mail and
s.

Salary is commensurate with experience.



If this ad describes you, please apply by submitting a detailed resume as well as a cover letter telling us why you would be an ideal candidate for this position and your salary expectations.

title: Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:
Ikigai Cases is hiring for an Ecommerce Operations Manager

Location: Remote

Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses



About the Company

Ikigai Cases (
) is a family-owned e-commerce business selling premiu
tal pill cases. Founded in December 2021, the business has been operated by two brothers from Washington, DC since then. After four years, the company has grown to selling thousands of pill cases every month and double-digit tea
mbers, including a thriving remote team.



Our mission is simple: to make exceptional pill cases and provide exceptional customer service. We uphold this commitment by managing our fulfillment operations in-house and offering white-glove service to our customers.



We are looking to hire an Ecommerce Operations Manager to join our growing remote team.



5 Core Responsibilities

1. Launch Execution: Plan and execute all sales, product launches, color launches, and promotional 
nts, ensuring offers, timing, assets, and systems go live correctly.



2. Cross-Functional Launch Coordination: Coordinate all teams involved in launches (Marketing,
, Creative, Website, Ops, CX, Fulfillment), managing timelines and dependencies to ensure aligned execution.



3. Website & Systems Setup for Launches: Set up and configure all website, Shopify, and related systems required for launches, including products, collections, discounts, carts, and launch-specific site changes.



4. Launch QA & System Hygiene: Own pre-launch QA and post-launch cleanup, ensuring accuracy across offers and flows and maintaining clean, current systems with no leftover artifacts.



5. Launch Process Improvement: Improve launch workflows, templates, and safeguards to support increasing launch volume and complexity with reduced risk.



Why You Should Take This Role

-You’ll be working at a brand that is obsessed with their customers and has built a loyal following. Just read a few of their reviews: 

-You’ll be working at a company that has scaled up extremely quickly - while focusing on the operational side of the business. Now that the operations are stabilized with key roles in place, we are focused on investing in growth.

-You’ll be working with people who have extreme levels of competitive fire in their bellies - people who will run through walls to make sure the company succeeds.

-You’ll be working hand-in-hand with the founders of the company - building the systems and growth strategy together.

-You’ll be working at a company with a robust product development roadmap that includes new colors / products releasing monthly



Required Experience & Skills Experience

-3+ years working directly on an e-commerce brand, with hands-on responsibility for executing sales, product launches, or promotional 
nts (not just website maintenance).

-Proven experience owning launches end-to-end, including setup, coordination, QA, and post-launch cleanup across teams and systems.

-Strong project management experience in e-commerce, coordinating multiple stakeholders to deliver time-sensitive launches.

-Working proficiency with Shopify admin for launch setup (products, collections, discounts, carts, and site changes; no coding required).

-Clear written communication and high attention to detail in revenue-critical work.

-Experience working with Notion or similar project management tools

-Must be based outside the United States.



Preferred Experiences (Nice To Have’s)

-Experience running A/B tests using platforms such as Intelligems.

-Experience using page builders (Replo preferred) in addition to Shopify Theme Editor



Communication & English Proficiency 

-Strong written and verbal English skills.

-Ability to communicate effectively with internal teams and external partners via
.

-Ability to receive and provide constructive feedback.



Compensation Details

-Compensation: $1800 per month + performance-based bonuses

-Work Hours: 50 hours per week, Monday to Friday Business Hours, EST

-Paid Holidays: 10 paid holidays per year

-PTO: 1 week earned for every 6 months worked at the company



To Apply

Fill out the application form here:

title: Freelance Web Designer (Figma)
description:
About Us

Pixel Eye Studio is a U.S.-based design agency that builds beautiful, thoughtful websites for mission-driven organizations — nonprofits, religious orders, educational institutions, and purpose-led brands. We care deeply about craft, typography, and creating design that feels intentional rather than templated.



We're looking to add another talented web designer to our roster of freelance collaborators for ongoing project work.



What You'll Do:

• Design modern, custom website layouts in Figma (desktop, tablet, and mobile)

• Translate client brand guidelines into polished, on-brand web design

• Collaborate with our project manager and dev team on handoff and revisions

• Iterate based on feedback from clients and our creative director

• Occasionally refresh or redesign sections of existing client websites



What We're Looking For

• 3+ years of web design experience with a strong portfolio of live websites

• Expert-level Figma skills (components, auto-layout, variants, responsive frames)

• Strong understanding of visual hierarchy, typography, spacing, and color

• Familiarity with designing for WordPress builds (knowing what's realistic to develop)

• Excellent written English and clear communication

• Reliable response times during overlap with U.S. Eastern Time

• Attention to detail and ability to follow brand systems precisely



Nice to Have

• Experience designing for nonprofits, faith-based orgs, or educational institutions

• Basic understanding of SEO principles as they relate to page structure

• Illustration or icon design skills



How to Apply

To be considered, your application must include:

• A link to your portfolio (applications without a portfolio link will not be reviewed)

• A brief note about which 1–2 projects in your portfolio you're most proud of, and why

• Your current availability (hours per week) and preferred hourly rate within our range

• The word "Mandalay" somewhere in your message so we know you read this post carefully



We review every qualified application and reply within 5–7 business days. Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Remote Intake Coordinator
description:
About the Position: Remote Intake Coordinator - Registered Dietitian Clinic



Health Loft is seeking an Intake Coordinator to join our team. We are looking for an individual with strong communication skills that is motivated, and self-driven. This position would serve as the initial point of contact for new patients, collecting relevant history and insurance information over the phone or via
. This individual would also assist with directing patients to the appropriate department, rescheduling of current clients, scanning and uploading of paper documents/checks, and answering basic billing questions.



About Health Loft:

Health Loft, based in Chicago, Illinois, provides medical nutritional counseling from expert registered dietitians (RD's) to individuals in multiple states. We make it easy for patients to see an RD by accepting their health insurance and offering convenient access to a licensed professional via our telehealth platform.



Our Mission: We understand the life changing work that RD's provide, as well as the difficulty patients have using their health insurance when seeking their care. Our mission is to bridge that gap by strategically growing, leading, and delivering on innovative medical nutrition therapy nationwide. By investing in our team and our patients, we will elevate the individual experience for all clients.

Our Patients: Our focus is on helping as many patients gain access to the knowledge and care of an RD as possible. We see a range of ages and conditions including but not limited to eating disorders, intuitive eating, diabetes, PCOS, weight management, cardiovascular disease, women's health, and more.

Why Join Health Loft:



Our Team: The entire team at Health Loft is focused on making this the best place to work.

Great culture: We strongly believe in working and learning together as a team. Our tea
ets regularly on a weekly bases to discuss successes, areas for learning and development, and goals. We also make a point to schedule team-building and social events when possible (Covid dependent).

We listen: We believe our tea
mbers are our greatest source of innovation and we actively work to incorporate feedback to make Health Loft a better place for our tea
mbers and clients alike.

Flexibility: Enjoy the ability to work from home, skipping the lengthy commute and expense of having to go into the office.

Our Core Values



Excellence

Growth Mindset

Patient Centricity

Autonomy

Job responsibilities includes but not limited to:



Answer all incoming calls promptly, politely, and take/relay messages as necessary.

Following up with via phone and
 to schedule new patient leads.

Schedule new and existing patients in accordance with clinic policy.

Maintain all patient charts according to company policy.

Verify eligibility and benefits

Answer basic billing questions

Troubleshoot client issues

Maintain patient confidentiality.

Responsible for tracking and documentation of referrals and new patient leads.

Complete assigned projects on time and within parameters as directed by management.

Collect, scan, and upload paper claim documents and checks.

Other duties as assigned by management.

Qualifications:



Must have worked in the medical field or related field within the last two years



High School diploma or GED required. Associate degree preferred.

Excellent communication skills and organizational skills.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Ability to multi-task.

Experience with Google Workspace a +

Previous experience using EMR/EHR system.

Must demonstrate effective communication skills.

Basic medical terminology preferred

title: Guest Comms and Operations Specialist - Airbnb BDC Direct
description:
GUEST COMMS & OPERATIONS SPECIALIST — High Responsibility Role

Salary: PHP 65,000/month



Sunday to Friday (Wednesdays and Saturdays off)



This role is probably not for you. We are looking for an elite level, top player. 



Are you an A* Organised Multi-Tasker?



Are you the type of person who can handle messages, cancellations, calm guests down, protect revenue, upsell confidently, and still keep systems organised like a machine, all at once and still be in charge?



Are you a great speaker on the phone? Can you do maintenance Co-ordination?



PureStay manages 60+ short-stay properties across the UK 



Operations is the heartbeat of the business — and we’re hiring a Guest Comms all-rounder / Hospitality Operations Expert to become the front line of guest relationship development and help drive direct bookings + revenue, while also supporting the wider ops engine (including light maintenance coordination support for Carlos).



This is not an entry-level VA role. This is for someone who excels, is the best, and already knows the short-stay/OTA world and wants a serious long-term position in a fast-growing UK company.





Managing guest communication across multiple channels (Airbnb + OTAs + direct)

Handling escalations quickly and professionally (complaints, issues, high-pressure situations)

Protecting revenue and reducing refunds where possible (without damaging brand reputation)

Driving guest relationship development and confidently extending / selling when appropriate

Taking ownership of guest relationship comms and upsell conversations

Supporting Maintenance coordination when needed (booking trades, updates, follow-ups)

Communicating with our Sub Contracting HK Teams and ensuring their training is sharp at all times



Top Priorities (Non-Negotiable Skills)



OTA + Systems expertise: Airbnb, 
, channel manager experience, multi-OTA workflows

Listing expertise: you understand listings, optimisations, content edits, and performance improvements

Relationship building: you listen properly, ask the right questions, and handle people with presence and confidence

Maintenance coordination support: you can work with trades, follow up, and keep everyone aligned





You are:



Excellent in spoken and written English (UK-facing communication daily)

High energy, calm under pressure, and confident on calls

Extremely organised (you don’t drop balls)

Proactive and solutions-first (you don’t wait to be told)

Executive Assistant-minded: you anticipate, you clarify, you execute

You know your worth and want to help scale a serious team to the next level

You know your weaknesses, when you are tired, and not at full strength (happens to us all)



Schedule & Pay

Salary: PHP 65,000/month (we want a high-level person)

Work days: Sun, Mon, Tues, Thurs, Fri

Weekdays 10:00–20:00 UK 



Benefits:

2 weeks paid holiday

1 week sick pay

3 months probation period



Platforms You’ll Use

Airbnb, 
, other OTAs, Uplisting, WhatsApp,
, Stripe, Google Drive, Trello, Slack, Bigin by Zoho, Pricelabs, Ring Central, Ring Doorbell



How To Apply



Subject Line - NEW2026 Application



Include:

A short cover letter (max 200–300 words) explaining why you are a fit for short-stay guest comms + ops

Your updated CV



A 1–3 minute intro video



Answer these 4 questions (short, direct):

Q1: What channel manager(s) and OTAs have you used daily?

Q2: What do you do when a guest demands a refund due to an issue at check-in? (Outline your steps.)

Q3: What’s your experience with deposits/waivers/claims/ID checks + Stripe?

Q4: What does “excellent guest comms” look like?



Applications without answers + video will not be reviewed.



Good luck. 



JP

title: Accounting Manager
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a hands-on Accounting Manager who thrives in a fast-paced startup environment and has experience working with U.S. businesses. This role is ideal for someone who is highly organized, detail-oriented, and comfortable taking ownership across multiple areas in a growing company.

In a startup setting, accounting requires flexibility and a proactive mindset. The right candidate will be able to manage competing priorities, move fluidly between tasks, and stay closely involved in day-to-day accounting operations while helping ensure everything runs smoothly.

You will play a key role in maintaining accurate financial records, supporting reporting, and ensuring compliance with U.S. accounting standards.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and execute monthly, quarterly, and annual close processes

Prepare and review journal entries, account reconciliations, and financial statements

Maintain the general ledger and supporting schedules

Oversee and execute accounts payable and accounts receivable processes

Ensure accurate bookkeeping and financial records

Prepare monthly financial reports and supporting documentation

Support financial analysis and reporting for internal stakeholders

Assist with audits and maintain proper financial documentation

Operate effectively in a fast-paced, high-growth startup environment

Handle a wide range of accounting responsibilities simultaneously

Collaborate with operations and finance teams to keep processes running efficiently

Identify and support improvements in accounting workflows, systems, and documentation





Requirements



Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field

5+ years of accounting experience, preferably supporting U.S.-based companies

Experience working in a startup or high-growth environment

Strong experience with end-to-end accounting processes and month-end close

Advanced proficiency in Excel and accounting software (QuickBooks, NetSuite, Xero, or similar)





What We’re Looking For



A hands-on professional who is comfortable executing accounting tasks directly

Someone adaptable who can take ownership and operate across multiple areas

Strong multitasking and prioritization skills

High attention to detail and a strong sense of accountability

Comfortable working with U.S. financial processes and cross-functional teams





Nice to Have



CPA or equivalent certification

Experience with financial system implementations or process improvements

Experience working with remote or international teams

title: Sales Development Representative
description:
Overview:

Birdy is a GTM strategy firm. We don’t just send
s, we run high-level experiments to find out what actually works for our clients. We are looking for a sharp, tech-savvy SDR who can manage the entire outbound engine. This will start out as part time, and move to full time.



Your Responsibilities:



Messaging & Strategy: Write outbound sequences, test different CTAs/Hooks, and pivot messaging every 1-2 weeks based on data.



Software Management: Set up and manage outbound tools (Instantly, Apollo, LinkedIn automation, etc.).



Inbox Management: Reply to prospect messages, handle objections, and book meetings directly onto the client's calendar.



Reporting: Build weekly reports that show exactly what is working and what isn’t.



Data Quality: Work with our data specialists to ensure every lead is manually verified and high-intent.

Must have 2+ years of SDR experience, writing sequences, working with technology.



Flawless Written English: You must be able to write Peer-to-Peer copy that doesn't sound like a sales bot or AI slop.



Technical Proficiency: Experience with modern outbound tech stacks.



Scientific Mindset: You enjoy testing variables and looking at data to see why one sequence beat another.



High Communication: You are proactive and won't wait for us to find a problem before you solve it.



How to Apply:

Please include an example of a 50-word outbound
 you’ve written that successfully booked a meeting. No AI slop. Additionally, prove that you are a good, proficient writer.

title: Credit Repair Specialist (Part-Time | Remote | Per Client Basis)
description:
We are currently seeking an experienced Credit Repair Specialist who understands how to strategically remove inaccurate, unverifiable, and outdated items using proven dispute methods.



This role is ideal for someone who is detail-oriented, results-driven, and familiar with consumer protection processes.



Position Overview:

 • Part-time, flexible schedule (based on client workload)

 • Remote position

 • Compensation based on experience and/or per client



Responsibilities:

 • Analyze client credit reports and identify negative items

 • Execute disputes using FTC, CFPB, and BBB complaint methods

 • Submit and manage disputes through DisputeFox

 • Track progress and provide updates on client files

 • Ensure disputes are completed in a timely and strategic manner

 • Assist with client file organization and backend processes



Requirements:

 • Proven experience in credit repair (required)

 • Strong understanding of consumer laws and dispute processes

 • Experience using DisputeFox (preferred)

 • Familiarity with FTC, CFPB, and BBB complaint workflows

 • Excellent attention to detail and organization

 • Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Bonus Skills:

 • Knowledge of Metro 2 compliance

 • Experience handling high-volume client files

 • Strong communication skills for client updates



Who We’re Looking For:
